reviews.text: My lawyer suddenly fell ill and was unable to help me to appear in court. I was anxious to find a new lawyer when I was in the most difficult time. The two lawyers Shane Singh & Selam Gezahegn helped me and looked at my case very carefully and were willing to help me. Although my lawyer recovered miraculously, I am still deeply grateful to these two lawyers for their help. They are very professional and experienced. I highly recommend them to everyone who needs help.

David has been a blessing I believe I found through a prayer that was answered. I am still wondering if I'm going to wake up back into the nightmare I left before contacting David.Because of his excellence we just settled and have been awarded more than I was hoping for in a matter on 2 or 3 months instead of years like it could have been. If you are reading this and looking for help like I was please call David and let him work his magic . You'll see what I mean.

David and his team are professional and amazing to work with. Teh compassion David shows for his clients combined with the expertise and knowledge of the legal system is rare in the world these days.  I cannot recommend him highly enough.

This law firm, especially Gayle, is amazing.   My name is David Simon and I'm a lawyer in San Diego.   The San Diego DMV has mistakenly been sending my mail to this firm for a few weeks now.  Simon Law.  Go figure.  Gayle packages up the mail and forwards it to me time and time again.  It has saved my clients so much headache and I have never met her.  We now have the entire San Diego DMV office trying to clear up this error but any law firm that has staff like this is someone I would trust with my legal matters.   Thank you Gayle and thank you Simon Law!
I was calling about a few concerns I had. They were very helpful.
Simon Law was my savior while going through a terrible and protracted divorce. They did such a great job that I had them create my living trust.

I finally found my peace of mind i feel like my own family helps me after my 10 years of being divorce this Law Office gives me freedom, peace of mind and what i deserve to start my new life . And i really thank god to help me find  this Law Office specially SELAM who treat me like a real family and fights for my rights .
More power and GOD BLESS SIMON LAW OFFICE....

After working with, against and for many attorneys over the years, I can say with confidence that David Simon is undoubtedly one of the best attorneys and most impressive characters I have ever met.  I was fortunate enough to have Mr. Simon appear on behalf (and in the absence) of my primary representation where I witnessed how the court and it's players respond to David.  I was extremely impressed to say the least, delivering a perfect outcome. I don't write many attorney reviews, two to be exact... David happens to be the son of my first recommendation, Bonnie Johnson.  David comes from an environment of class, respect, and sheer brilliance.  You are on a winning team with Simon in your corner and if your unfortunate enough to find yourself in opposition, you may experience a swift defeat.... However, David will somehow still make you feel like you won.  That's the kind of guy he is.  Highly recommended.

4/29/13

HIGH QUALITY LEGAL PROFESSIONAL

I recently met David Simon at the home of one of his clients. The meeting lasted just under an hour, during which I was able to get a good idea of how David operates professionally. He was very attentive to his client's needs and remained focused and directed. He was prepared for our meeting and the documents we looked over were organized and complete. Each document was thoroughly reviewed for accuracy.  This helped make the meeting run efficiently and smoothly. He was very pleasant to talk to and I enjoyed working with him.

I have worked at a law firm for the past 7 years and these qualities are all very important in the legal profession. (Well, really in all professions). Some attorneys can seem very rushed and impersonal. It's nice when you encounter ones who treat you with a high level of respect.

I am 64 years old and never in my whole life have I ever been sued by anyone. Approximately two years ago, I was sued by my neighbor and I was so scared and I didn’t know what to do or how to defend myself. I called many lawyers and they all wanted to charge me a very expensive hourly fee just to listen to my story of my lawsuit. After about two days of searching, I found Steven Cross, spoke with him and he really calmed me down and he took his time and explained to me in great detail how to proceed without charging me anything. Then after I showed him all the videos that the plaintiff had harass our family specially my Wife. Steven Cross agreed to take on our case. He immediately came to our home to meet me and my wife and again, after reviewing all the videos, he suggested not so much to Answer the lawsuit, but also make a counter lawsuit against the plaintiff. Our case have taken about two years and during that two years Steven Cross was so patient and always there to answer our concern. We couldn’t ask for a better Attorney than Steven Cross. He always looked out for our best interest. And his advice to us are always right on. Finally, last week after two years and back-and-forth with the plaintiff, they finally back down and dropped their lawsuit and we received a good amount of compensation from plaintiff. The key thing here that we wanted to express is that our attorney Steven Cross was so patient and considerate in explaining everything to us in great detail during the two years handling our case. Steven, from the bottom of our heart we thank you

I am extremely impressed with the Law Office of Steven H. Cross and would highly recommend him. He expertly handled our case and provided us with support and guidance along the way. Steven is extremely knowledgeable and truly has the best interest of his clients in mind!
I had the pleasure of attending law school with Mr. Cross. He is the definition of hardworking and professional. I will always recommend him to prospective clients!

I highly recommend Mr. Cross as an excellent attorney specializing in real estate issues.  He patiently took the time to understand the details of our case, asked clarifying questions, and listened to our concerns.  At every stage of the process, he explained his approach and kept us in the loop.  In the end, Mr. Cross was able to deliver the exact outcome that we had desired.   Mr. Cross is a kind, knowledgeable and effective lawyer and we will continue to use his services in the future.

Highly recommend Law Office of Steven H. Cross. They are friendly, experienced and knowledgeable. Steven H. Cross made a stressful processes easier from start to finish. He took time to explain, update and provided us with professional guidance. It was a pleasure to work with him.

At one of the most challenging times in my life I was confronted by very hostile and unethical tenants. They became aware of my difficult circumstances and wanted to break the signed one year lease agreement and demanded to get their deposit back. They also threatened to sue me for an additional $10,000 for moving cost! Steven Cross stepped in and held them accountable for the signed lease and saved me from their ongoing phone calls, text and email harassments. Most importantly Mr. Cross was able to collect the amount of rental income I lost during this senseless case against me.  From now on I want him on my side in any legal litigation.

I have known Steven for decades, and he is one of the most meticulous, wise, competent, caring, and professional  lawyers I have ever known. He’s always helpful in legal areas and I think his clients are lucky to have them because he works hard for them in ways that go beyond money. He’s not the kind of lawyer that just wants to charge you, he really wants to give you the best possible service and help restore justice for you and your family.

Steven has been a friend and colleague for over a decade. Steven has consistently demonstrated a keen understanding of complex legal issues, a strong work ethic, and an unparalleled level of dedication to his clients and their wellbeing.

There are few attorneys that I would call to represent me in court - Steven is one of them.
Steven is very kind hearted and pays attention to detail, to give his clients the best support! I was very happy with his services ! A awesome advocate!

I had the pleasure of working with Steven Cross when a gym attempted to unlawfully keep my money. I cannot recommend this lawyer highly enough.
From the moment I first spoke with Steven, he put me at ease and took the time to listen to my concerns. Steven explained the legal process in clear, easy-to-understand terms and helped me to feel confident that I had made the right choice in seeking his representation.
This level of personal attention made a big difference in what was otherwise a stressful and uncertain situation.
Thanks to his efforts, the gym eventually agreed to return my money, and I was able to move on from the situation feeling satisfied with the resolution.
I am so grateful for the help and support during a challenging time. If you ever find yourself in need of legal representation, I would not hesitate to recommend Steven H. Cross to anyone. He is a true professional, and his commitment to clients is second to none.

Mr. Schott was very thorough and professional while handling my case. He explained the process/steps at our first meeting with follow-ups/updates along the way. When decisions on how to proceed needed to be made, a few options were presented, with pros and cons, so that I could make an informed decision. This was true all the way through settlement negotiations.

As unpleasant as legal matters can be, Mr. Schott was reassuring and put me at ease throughout the entire process. In the end, I feel that a fair settlement was reached and am happy with the results.

Would highly recommend Mr. Schott's services.

Very good lawyer and was so patient. He actually worried more about me then anything and cared about my health and well being.  He Wanted to make sure I would be ok after my injury. I Would highly recommend him to anyone. Thanks local 104 for Recommending me to him. Thank you again. Mark Gearheart!!
Mike D’Angelo

Karen is an amazing mediator/negotiation lawyer. I hired her a couple years ago and I was very happy with her service. She is professional and gets the job done in a timely manner! I would highly recommend her professional services to anyone! She's the best!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you.

reviews.text:
Karen Matcke Crosby is an exceptional Attorney.  She gave 100% in understanding my case.  I met with other attorneys before her, whom I found discouraging because they didn’t believe me.  My ex-partner’s attorney deposition was very intimidating, filled with lies in his lawsuit against me and giving me two weeks to sign; otherwise, he will sue me in court.  Something I never experienced before.  She took the time to listen and understood what I was going through.   And thanks to Karen’s legal proficiency, the Judge granted us into mediation.  Because Karen is an excellent Attorney and Mediator, I got a good settlement!

I would definitely hire her again.
reviews.ownerResponse: It's wonderful to hear about your positive experience! We truly appreciate you highlighting our dedication to understanding your case and achieving a favorable outcome through mediation.

reviews.text: I felt defeated when I was denied with my Social Security disability. But I found Raymond on google and called him. Right away, he listened and explained everything I needed. He explained everything including what to expect and what to do when forms are needed. The whole process took a while ( I knew this from the start) and it was nerve racking. Raymond was there from start to finish. Calling to check in, to update me with any news and guided me through my court hearing. I am so thankful for Raymond. My journey was not easy but knowing I had someone to rely on to help me navigate my appeal made it so much better. I couldn’t do it alone. This review has been longtime coming. Thank you Raymond!
He was a horrible lawyer he didnt do his homework cause we should have won but he didnt even try do not use this lawyer if he was getting paid we would have won
Raymond took the time to talk to me about my situation that didn't line up with his study of law. If I was able to do business with him I'm sure there would be more stars.

I can't imagine having a better experience than I have had with Raymond. As someone in my early 20s with various mental health disorders, I was turned away by multiple attorneys saying that I had no chance. Raymond was willing to take my calls and answer my general questions early on, before I was even a client, and made the process of going through my disability claim so seamless. I was granted benefits, and he has remained a wonderful resource even after the fact. I'm incredibly thankful for all of his help, time, and hard work and can't recommend him enough.
Very helpful
I used her services back in 2013. She wasn’t  to bad. I mean she was all nice sooooo she did what she was suppose to do. And I got my settlement.
The worst experience ever.

The best!

Great law firm! Honest, diligent and  result oriented.

Maggie is passionate about helping people, and doesn't come off like the typical attorney out for themselves with the clients being an after thought.  Maggie treats her clients like family, and I'm so happy she has helped us.

After an accident where my wife was hit from the rear and pushed into another car at a stoplight, we were uncertain what to do.  After contacting Maggie at Revere Law Group, all the stress and worry went away. Right away she told us to let her take care of everything.  She referred us to a chiropractor and informed us of the necessary steps for conclusion of this situation in a positive way.  We did not have to pay out of pocket for the medical services and in the end, everything was better than we otherwise could have expected.  Maggie, thank you very much for working so hard even during Covid to take care of us.

The law office of Durham and Ng are great to their clients. We all know dealing with divorce issues can be very stressful and confusing if you're not familiar with the law. Jonathan and Diane made it less stressfull. If you're looking for a family lawyer specifically divorce lawyers i highly recommend this office. Thanks to Jonathan and Diane

Although the circumstances surrounding hiring a lawyer is never easy, Attorney Ned Ng and his paralegal Dianne were absolutely amazing to work with. My father married overseas in the only country that prohibits divorce (Philippines). I planned on helping my Dad file divorce paperwork but after doing some research, realized my dad would need professional legal services.
I spoke to two law firms and felt even more stressed out because no one had much experience with international divorce. I emailed the Law offices of Durham and Ng and received a phone call within 24 hours.
Our initial consult was with Attorney Ned Ng. Ned has experience with international divorce, was well thought out when answering all of our questions and the retaining fee and fee structure is appropriate and fair.
After leaving Ned’s office, my dad asked for my personal opinion. Knowing that my Dad takes my advice quite seriously, I know I had to think about this thoroughly or this decision could put my dad at risk. However, I felt the utmost confidence that Ned would handle the divorce appropriately.
After retaining Durham and Ng, everything moved quickly (paperwork, meeting and helpful conversations). Ned is a true professional and my father could not ask for a better lawyer. He is aggressive, by the book and extremely knowledgeable. He would even call between court cases just to answer questions and would see us as soon as his court schedule allowed. He’s a great lawyer and made this process surprisingly pleasant.
We also had the pleasure of working with Ned’s paralegal, Dianne. Dianne is tough, tenacious and an awesome paralegal. There were occasions, I would email and her replies were almost instantaneous or in my inbox by the time I checked. She is truly an asset to this law firm!
Fast forward six months, my dad is officially divorced and was awarded favorably in everything he requested. I truly appreciate everything they have done for my father. I would recommend The Law Offices of Durham and Ng, without hesitation. Thank you is not enough for the individual care and consideration throughout the whole process. Ned and Dianne, you guys are truly amazing and we are forever thankful!

From the first day Jerron was very straightforward and helpful with my disability case. He paid attention to detail and really listened to my struggles. I appreciate his help in walking me through this process. He was very reliable and responsive, at no point did I feel lost in regards to my case. I would definitely recommend him to anyone looking for legal advice.

Mr Harding helped me win my disability case! He is very professional, polite, and knowledgeable.
He always returned my calls, and helped me step by step with my case. I highly recommend him.
Thank you again for your excellent service!

He’s not gonna tell you what you wanna hear he’s gonna tell you what you need to hear and he’s gonna tell you what you need to do And help you follow through with whatever it is that you need to do. This attorney is for his clients and you can tell that right away when First meeting him and this is the type of attorney that you want to represent you at whatever stage you’re in with your Social Security process. Jerron is an exceptional Attorney.  Very Professional: Stellar at following up, explaining the process and not giving up!  I highly recommend him!

Words cannot express hot grateful I am to Jerron Harding. Professional, Reliable, Honest, Compassionate, and dependable are only a few words to describe this Law Office. Jerron Harding is very educated, reliable and efficient! I highly recommend his services hands down for your Social Security Disability case.

Jerron Harding exceeds Excellence in navigating the Social Security Administration Appeals Process. reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review! Our success rate was 100% when you started with us. Unfortunately, we can no longer make this claim. We still have a very high success rate of approximately 99%!

i strongly recommend  Atty Jerron H.Harding to handle a  case like mine (disability claims). Trusted and reliable.🙏👍
I want to say thank you for all you've done to help my son win his case. You're a great attorney. I want to recommend you to anyone who's ready to win their case!

Again, I highly recommend Jerron Harding for your Social Security Appeals case.

David was kind, funny, knowledgeable and very helpful! My case is a little gray but he gave me some homework to work on while we wait to see how things play out. David and team have done an amazing job helping to secure a settlement due to my cessation of employment at a top firm. Thank you so much for your help.
A friend of mine referred me to Ratner Molineaux and I was very happy she did. They walked us through all the possible ways to approach our problem and were very supportive in our decisions.

David, Shelley, Hanna and Halsey did an amazing job with helping me with my case. They truly made it an easy experience and I’m greatly appreciative of their efforts and all their hard work.

Thank you all for your help!

I was referred to Ratner Molineaux after my daughter and I suffered injury and property damage resulting from a defective product in our home. During my very first conversation with David Ratner, I found him to be straightforward, professional and extremely responsive to my concerns. Thereafter, David took the time to walk us through each and every stage of the litigation process and was an excellent advocate for my daughter and I. He remained fiercely protective of our interests and represented us well during mediation, preparation for trial, and settlement talks.

David's style is very direct and to the point, which might be off putting for some, but worked well for me since I tend to be laser focused when dealing with business matters. Near the conclusion of my case I had the opportunity to meet his partner Shelley, who had also diligently and effectively assisted with our litigation. In the end, our result was more than adequate and both my daughter and I walked away extremely satisfied with both the representation we'd received, and the outcome of our claim.

I definitely recommend this firm.

I highly recommend to avoid David Ratner. In my experience as his client, I found him to be dishonest and unprofessional. When I questioned him about his excessive charges he ignored me and didn't respond to my emails. Therefore, I felt obligated to warn others from losing their money and getting very poor legal service from this rude and greedy man.

David and Shelley are the best! They worked very hard and diligently to get me the justice I deserved.They were on top of my case every step of the way and always kept me in the loop. Shelley also went above and beyond to make sure I was taken care of with all her great legal skills, knowledge, and expertise. I refer them to anyone I come across that is in need of legal assistance without any hesitation. They are both truly a blessing!
Shelley and Dave are awesome!  They handled my case like true professionals and were fun to work with.  I would not hesitate to recommend them to anyone in need of truly outstanding representation.

I needed help with an employment discrimination case, and the team at Ratner Molineaux were amazing to work with. David was patient and straightforward, bringing relief and encouragement at the right times during what could be a very complex and upsetting process. I found the support team to be super responsive, very prompt with followup and taking my case seriously, pushing it forward with appropriate urgency. Highly recommend this firm!

reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry to hear that you were unsatisfied with your experience with our firm. We strive to provide excellent service to all our clients. We don't have you as a client of record here at our firm. Please contact our office directly so we can address your concerns.

reviews.text: Shelley and David are the best.  They are smart, diligent, supportive, and get results.  Their legal knowledge consistently put them on top of our opposition, and we were successful because of their experience and tenacity.  During the pandemic cases lagged.  Shelley and David worked to push it forward to see an end as fast as possible.  Throughout the entire process, the RatnerMolineaux firm supported me, and I cannot thank them enough for the success that they achieved for me!

Shelley and David were wonderful to work with through a pretty stressful and overwhelming lawsuit. They kept my best interest at heart, but also helped me make tough choices about what was important to me in the outcome of the suit. I appreciated their hands on and direct approach in talking through outcomes. Would recommend to anyone with an employment law issue in CA.

I highly recommend Shelley and David. I had full confidence in both of them helping me settle which they did! They are knowledgeable and extremely professional. Thank you both for all your help! My family and I appreciate it. I will definitely be recommending you to any family or friends that may use your services.
Shelly and David are passionate attorneys dedicated to meeting client needs with years of strategic experience/knowledge to help  achieve a fair and favorable result.

David and Shelly are very professional, knowledgeable regarding the law,  and truly the right attorneys to go to.

They worked on my case with a BIG WIN. I would like to recommend their services to anyone.

Jay Renneisen is such an amazing, professional and honest lawyer. He is definitely someone you would want to have on your side! He was attentive to my needs, listened to all my concerns, was very organized and incredibly responsive to every email and phone call. He was able to win my case and get the result that I wanted! I would highly recommend Jay to anyone looking for a lawyer for his scope of work!

I called to inquire about engaging the services of JWLG today regarding adding a spouse to a title, and was able to speak with Jon directly!

He was super nice, and provided me with some great information as just a really nice gesture.  He even advised some cheaper options we might want to go with.

Through the leads he gave me, we actually decided to go a more cost-effective route.

But, this practice has generated a lot of goodwill in case we have future needs in the areas they specialize in (or come across logical referral opportunities).

Thank you Jon (and team... the person I first spoke to was great too)!
reviews.ownerResponse: It was my pleasure speaking with you. Glad to hear the information was helpful. I will let my team know you had a good experience! Thanks for the positive feedback!

reviews.text: Made appointment to have my case reviewed  came to office to drop off paperwork the same day came to my appointment date and time a week later only to find none was made... disappointing, felt like a waste of my time i will look elsewhere for legal advice

Can’t say enough about this Law Group. I contacted them to get help with tenant issues & was given a free phone consultation and advice on how to best handle my issue legally. Charles & Dustin(associate) were very professional, friendly and helpful from the get go with no upsell pressure whatsoever. I highly recommend this company for all your legal issues.

I want to extend my deepest gratitude and thanks to Jon Webster and his entire team at Jon Webster law group for representing and successfully resolving my employment law issue.

Jon Webster: Your knowledge and leadership were the calm in the storm. Thank you for making me feel like any question or concern I had was important. Thank you for taking the time in advance to do your due diligence to ensure my case was a journey we both wanted to endeavor on.
Thank you for allowing me ownership in my decisions and not telling me what I wanted to do. Thank you for recognizing moments of unease for me during this process and reassuring me my emotions were valid throughout the process. Thank you for getting me JUSTICE and VALIDATION!

I also want to give credit to John and acknowledge his ability as a leader by forming a supportive and knowledgeable team around him. Everyone at Jon Webster Law made me and my concerns feel important.

To the person reading this, wondering if the Jon Webster Law group is for them. I assure you this is the team and people you want fighting for you. Jon and his team are honest and upfront. They do their due diligence. They did not make wild promises. Instead, they educate you on the process. And by doing so, they empower YOU to make the right choices for you, the most important person!

Jon Webster is informative and cares about his clients. It was easy to set up an appointment with his really nice staff. During the appointment he took time and was able to answer all of my questions. He is very professional and was able to help me. I highly recommend him and will be returning for any future questions I have. I am super happy to have an amazing local lawyer!

Integrity is the best word to describe Jon Webster.  It's difficult to describe his level of professionalism without going into the details of the case but he and his office deserve an incredible review.  The outcome could have been much different.  The possibility of Jon Webster being able to make far more out of the case was extremely high but he instead steered me toward the option of settling while I was ahead so that I may put it all behind me.  My family and I are happy and relieved it's all behind us.  You're the best!
I'm more than satisfied with my Lawyers

Great staff! Was let go wrongfully yesterday from Arco/ampm he informed me I was not being paid the correct salary pay I was being paid well under. On top of that he gave me some great advice on many other things. Fantastic guy! Would recommend him anytime!

Stay away from this law firm.  Especially Craig Livingston. He hires an investigator to collect facts on the case and doesn't pay him as agreed. A nice enough person while on the telephone and even in person but when it comes to paying for what he has asked the investigator to do, he puts him off for months and won't answer his phone. I don't recommend this firm. Read other posts on Yelp.  They too have to chase him down to get paid or for him to do his job.

I can’t thank Zachary Kweller enough for everything he’s done for me throughout my workers’ compensation case. From the very beginning, Zachary made sure I understood every step of the process. He took his time, explained things clearly, and never once made me feel pressured or rushed.

His law firm fought to make sure I received all the compensation I truly deserved. During such a stressful time, having a team that genuinely cared and stayed on top of my case meant everything to me.

I truly appreciate all the hard work Zachary and his group put into my case. If anyone is dealing with a situation similar to mine, I highly recommend them. You’ll be in good hands.
They were very helpful and informative. Im grateful that they took my case. Thank you Law Offices of Zachary M. Kweller

Zachary and his team provided exceptional service in managing my case. They maintained consistent communication throughout the process, ensuring I was informed and involved in all decisions. My case presented some complexities as Zachary took over midway through negotiations due to my previous attorney's retirement. Nevertheless, Zachary successfully resolved the matter, achieving an outcome that exceeded my expectations. For anyone seeking dedicated and effective legal representation, Zachary and his team are highly recommended.

Zachary Keller is an exceptional workers’ compensation attorney. My case was extremely complex and took several years, but Zachary was thorough, patient, and dedicated every step of the way. When he left a large firm to start his own practice, I didn’t hesitate to follow him — that’s how much I trusted his expertise and commitment. He truly knows the laws inside and out and always fights to get you the best medical care and outcome possible.
Zachary is professional, compassionate, and genuinely cares about his clients’ well-being. I would recommend him time and time again to anyone needing a strong, knowledgeable advocate in their corner.
Thank you Zack!

Through the whole process I felt nothing less than complete confidence in me. Zachery, he was availble fir phone calls emails etc answered all questions, and when the insurance company made a second offer that I was ok with he asked if he could try and get more which he did,  if he's your attorney you're in good hands....

If you are looking for a workermens  comp  lawyer, look no further than zachary kweller! I had the pleasure of having him as my lawyer and the moment we spoke i knew i made the right decision. He explained the process and told me exactly what to expect, and that is exactly what happened. For this being my first time experiencing this situation, he made me feel like i had nothing to worry about, and that’s exactly how my experience with him. He fought hard for my case and i can’t express in words how much i truly appreciated that. I highly recommend Mr. Kweller and i will be recommending him to my family members if they too need a workermens comp lawyer. Trustworthy, reliable, informative, and very personable! Thank you Zachary, i appreciate you dearly!

As a physician working closely with patients who have suffered workplace injuries, I’ve had the opportunity to observe the work of many attorneys in the workers’ compensation space. Zachary Kweller, Esq. stands out as an exceptional advocate for injured workers. His professionalism, responsiveness, and deep understanding of the complex workers’ compensation system have made a meaningful difference in the lives of our shared patients.

From a clinical standpoint, it's clear that Mr. Kweller not only prioritizes the legal outcomes of his clients but also understands the importance of timely medical care, clear documentation, and ongoing communication with treating providers. He is respectful of our medical opinions and works collaboratively to ensure patients get the care and support they need without unnecessary legal delays.

I’ve seen firsthand how his involvement has helped patients feel more confident and supported throughout their recovery. I would not hesitate to recommend Zachary Kweller to any patient in need of a skilled and compassionate workers’ compensation attorney.
The best representation you can find. Insurance companies try to deny everything, Mr Kweller and his team will help get you treatment you need! Can't recommend enough!!

Zachery Kweller is very knowledgeable and his staff is very helpful and professional. They explain everything to you that is happening and represent you in every detail and are always easily available. I had another attorney before, and I never spoke to him or met him. Zachary Kweller makes the time for you and he wins!

The law offices of Zachary Kweller are simply top notch. I cannot say enough of how professional, detail oriented and attentive Mr. Kweller is in his practice. I had a workers comp case that was going on and on...the case was handed to Mr. Kweller's office bc previous attorney had forced retirement from health issues. It was like day and night. I was kept up to date, and my questions were always answered in a timely manner, with friendliness and with great consideration. The day of deposition, the  insurance company decided they wanted to settle. I was anxious and no previous experience with this. Mr. Kweller was right there, explained what was happening, went in to negotiate and the outcome was way beyond what I ever expected. Not to sound dramatic, but it was like the dark clouds of 2 years hanging over me had finally parted to let in bright sunshine and relief. His team worked together to bring clarity and closure in my case, communicating all the way. I don't know what inspires a lawyer to provide such great service, but I highly recommend his office and team. If only all people could experience such positivity in any court case, such as I did! Thank you Mr. Kweller and your team! Wishing much success and prosperity in 2025. 😇😊🙏🏽

Mr. Kweller and his team is awesome. They were quick to respond to all my questions and referrals needed during my journey with pre and post procedures. I’d recommend his team to anyone that’s in need of service where you are treated with respect and dignity. Thank you for your service.
Excellent work injury counsel.
Patrick and his whole team are amazing.  Detail oriented, helpful, knowledgeable, sharp and caring. I have referred two friends because Patrick is so great.

I had the privilege to work with Patrick Campbell and Daniel Cox Vasquez and the level of professionalism and detail they put in their work is absolutely extraordinary. They have been working on one of my cases since October, 31st, 2023 and they have been keeping me up to date and educating me on the latest process. It is currently July, 23rd, 2024 as i am writing this review and they have been with me with the process every step of the way. Every time i had a question or concern regarding the case they were able to answer and show me the potential outcome of what might and most likely happen regarding the case. In the future if i ever need to be represented by an attorney and a paralegal I will be coming back to their practice. I highly recommend them and they are worth my time and business.

I had the occasion to use Patrick Campbell as an attorney after an individual made a left turn directly in front of me causing an accident which totaled my van. The person admitted they were not paying attention and the police report indicated it was 100% their fault. Despite this, the insurance company for the negligent driver was not very cooperative so I enlisted the services of Patrick Campbell as my attorney, even though numerous people told me that since I did not lose any wages in terms of work, it was likely I would not be able to get a lawyer to take the case or any type of settlement. For me, it was about making sure that everyone who needed to be paid was taken care of and that I was able to get a reasonable replacement vehicle. The other positive note was with Patrick, I no longer had to deal directly with the insurance companies, which was a big relief. It was much better to hand off the reins to someone with significantly more experience than I had and it certainly showed. I am very glad I did, as he was excellent and exceeded any expectations that I had making sure that all outstanding charges were negotiated down to a reasonable level and paid off, so that no one would come back to me down the line and ask for reimbursement. He is reasonable and down to earth and has a large amount of experience in this field so he understands the process and how to make sure everything gets completed in a timely manner. He gave me the options on how to proceed and did not push one path or another although he certainly tried to give me all of the information and the possible outcomes with each. He kept me informed throughout the process and answered any questions that we had. I would highly recommend him for anyone who is considering legal action, especially if it is related to personal injury. I was happy with the settlement and it was very close to what he initially told me he thought it would be. The other positives were that I no longer had to worry about making sure all of the applicable payments were made and even more important to my psyche, I did not have to deal directly with any of the insurance companies, which was a huge relief. Again, I highly recommend Patrick Campbell as a lawyer.
by a friend of mine after I was bit by my neighbor's dog. They did a great job on my case and made sure my injuries were properly taken care of even though I did not have any kind of insurance.

won me a great settlement. But the best part was not having to deal with the insurance companies. I got all the medical treatment I needed right away after hiring them on with no hassles. I can't thank them enough!

Emily, a lawyer, has been extremely helpful and supported of my needs.

I am a victim of rent fraud and discrimination on the basis of disability, and Contra Costa Senior Legal Services refused to help me. The lawyer I spoke to--I believe her name was Veronica--was not even familiar with the most elementary facts of tenant law, such as that one tenant cannot evict another, that eviction requires a cause, that someone who has lived in a place for 28 days and receives mail there is by law on the lease, and that the disabled are protected by law from most evictions. She declined even to research these questions.

If this agency is neither qualified nor interested in protecting people over 60 (I am 62) from unlawful evictions, they should be immediately defunded and forced to close down.

Employees should not be allowed to post reviews, since their reviews are not and cannot be impartial. They are being paid by the people they are reviewing.
The best legal service of senior could have,

These people are good  they do put in the effort and really try to accommodate the people who need them !!! And   Honestly I don't like Attorney's in general But I do believe these people are there for there client's not for the money !!!!  Best service ever !!!!!! Extra mile they'll go !

I wasn't kept informed of stuff .But no effort at all to keep me informed of what was happening .Nor did she take any of the information that I was trying to give to her that should have been enough to have this handled and thrown out .
All attorney's were very helpful. They answered all my questions and gave me the forms I needed for my lawsuit. They were willing to continue to help me if I needed additional information.

They are the best!

I highly recommend this firm and the services they provide.
A must hire lawyer!! I highly recommend Atty Nick +++ I can't thank him enough!

reviews.text: I had an amazing experience with my attorney! He was knowledgeable and supportive, making a tough situation much easier to handle. I’m really satisfied with the help he provided. his staff were fantastic, always quick to answer my questions and keep me updated. They made me feel valued and informed throughout the process. Thanks to their hard work, I’m thrilled with the outcome. I highly recommend this law firm! Five stars all the way! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Professional, responsive and honest.  We have had a great working relationship with the firm.
John Greerty made getting a Trust and Will the easiest experience ever!  I would recommend  him  for all your trust needs!

I was given John’s name from a lawyer referral service as I needed assistance with a possible conservatorship for my elderly parents. We needed to remove a family member from their home. He was very kind and explained why a conservatorship wouldn’t work in our situation. He gave me suggestions and provided good advice that ultimately led to the removal. Will definitely reach out again for any future family estate issues! Highly recommend John.

Very well explained, and the entire living trust process was very easy and handled with great professionalism. It was quite difficult to find a bilingual and friendly lawyer. We are very happy with the service. Thank you very much!

I was looking for a Living Trust attorney for about 2 months. The main issue was my parents don't speak English very well. After making a few calls near Fremont and San Jose, the cost for a Spanish speaking attorney was very expensive.
I asked a few attorneys if my sister and I could translate. I was told that could be a conflict of interest.
Also, if I wanted to pay for a translator, the cost would be $1000.
I finally got a hold of Attorney John Greerty in Martinez.
I called John and asked if he spoke Spanish. John stated he was fluent in Spanish and he could explain the process to my parents.
We set up a time the following day for a phone call with my parents.
The conversation with my parents went very well. John explained the process and the cost savings of avoiding probate.
The next week, my parents and I met with John at his office.
John had everything prepared for the signing including the Notary.
Which made everything so convenient for my parents.
As we left John's office, my parents mentioned what a nice person John was.
They were so at ease with the entire process and felt comfortable with John handling the trust.
If anyone is looking for a Living Trust attorney, I highly recommend John Greerty.
I've already mentioned John to my neighbors.
The best part was it was stress FREE to me. Mr. Greerty made it very easy for me during a very difficult time.
Mr. Greerty helped me fully understand my situation and get prepared to take the next important steps. It has put my mind at ease.

I met with John Greerty Nov, 7, having easily made a timely appointment.  Mr. Greerty was consistently courteous, professional, knowledgeable, and personable.  He listened well to my concerns, reiterating his understanding of my goals to ensure that the correct service was provided.  Necessary papers were completed promptly and at a very reasonable price.  I would have no hesitation in returning to Mt. Greerty for future legal advice and needs and thank him for his assistance.  Elena Bunnell, Oakland
Excellent service. John went above and beyond in searching for additional information and documentation ensuring a positive outcome.  Highly recommend their services.

John was great with setting up my estate plan. He took care of everything including getting everything filed with the County! Easy to get ahold of and explained everything so and my family and I could understand.

Great attorney! John helped my mother and me get her will and estate planned out. It was as simple as one meeting to discuss what we were looking for and what he specifically recommended for her. At the following meeting, all the documents were reviewed and notarized. He produced a lot of essential documents with a quick turnaround—everything was taken care of within two weeks.
John is accessible and super friendly. It’s especially a plus that he speaks Spanish and is very culturally aware— with Latinos and was able to relate well to my parents and me. He’s also open to modifying any documents if things change in the future.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing! We’re glad we could make the estate planning process clear and approachable. We appreciate you choosing Greerty Law Group and are always here if you need anything.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi, Encrypt Theworld,
Thank you for taking the time to leave a response. We are always appreciative of feedback. However, we are genuinely surprised by your review and disagree with your statement as it is inaccurate.

It is difficult to tell exactly what kind of case you have from your review, but it appears you called us with some questions. We charge for legal services, meaning if you called seeking answers to legal questions, we would have quoted you a small consultation fee. You may not realize that the fee is based on both the time needed to meet with you and answer your questions as well as the time needed to review your documents and do any legal research necessary to be able to answer your questions. Apparently, you thought the quote was too high and therefore, reasonably declined the engagement.

We understand that some potential clients do not have much experience paying attorney’s fees and may be surprised by our small consultation fee. We don’t dispute your absolute right to shop for a lower price. However, your statement that we “wanted to make me pay to do the work I already did” cannot be accurate. We do not advise a prospective client about what work needs to be done on their case until we have met with them, reviewed their documents, and analyzed their situation.

In your case, since you did not go forward with a consultation, your case went no further than a preliminary scheduling conversation with our administrative staff. Our administrative staff members do not advise clients as to what legal work needs to be done. That is the role of the attorney, in the consultation meeting, which you did not have with us. No legal advice is given in the initial phone call to our office in any case, and none was given in your case.

Since your two-star Google review misrepresents our interaction and how we provide our services, we'd appreciate your help in correcting this error by removing your review. Thank you.

We all wish you the best of luck with your case.

reviews.ownerResponse: Dave, we sincerely apologize for your frustration. Unfortunately, we did have to wait to receive a number of items before we were able to begin our work on your matter. Once received, your matter was added to our work queue. We are not able to drop the work that we are in the process of doing for other clients in order to complete tasks on demand except in very rare cases where death is imminent. What could've been a full DUI conviction on my criminal and driving records turned into a slap of the wrist while keeping my driving privileges.

I called his office & he called me within 5 minutes after talking to his assistant. He helped me mitigate my situation before my first court date, led me through all the steps, answered any questions I had & explained things for me I did not understand. He is a kind, understanding, confident, a optimistic lawyer & person. My case could of turned worse but luckily I had Sam by my side, I am thankful & blessed to have found him.

Sam was able to navigate the complexities of my case with ease, and his attention to detail was unparalleled. He went above and beyond to ensure that my rights were protected and that I received the best possible outcome.

Misha is the most professional, capable and compassionate family law attorney I could have hoped to have by my side. Family law can get messy and personal and Misha made me feel comfortable throughout the process. In court, the judge appreciated her calm and non-confrontational demeanor. My case ended quickly, with a favorable outcome for me. Misha is honest and hardworking, and I would recommend her to my family and friends.

I can’t recommend Balestra Webb Law enough. Nick and Melanie both being nurse practitioners gives them a unique understanding of the incredibly complex legal landscape for "independent" NP practice in California, including the nuances of professional nursing corporations vs. medical corporation/MSO structures.

I primarily work with Nick. He’s incredibly responsive by email, thoughtful, and very kind. Initially, he helped ensure that my supervising physician arrangements / standardized procedures were fully compliant. My practice structure and scope is fairly complex given that I’ve worked across several specialties over the past nine years, and his guidance has been invaluable.

Nick has also been great about explaining some of the “unspoken rules” and regulatory nuances related to the BRN and broader practice structure issues. Based on those discussions, he advised transitioning to a Medical Corporation/MSO structure. This was especially important since Anthem and Blue Shield of California will not contract with a nursing corporation, which unfortunately limits patient access otherwise.

The turnaround has also been impressive. Within about a week of providing the required documents, the MSO was formed, and the Medical Corporation should be finalized shortly after. Nick is always willing to answer smaller questions without nickel-and-diming clients, and he was also generous enough to offer me a significant discount as a returning client planning to work with them long term.

While I haven’t worked as directly with Melanie, I know she has been involved in communications with CANP and BRN and has been advocating for nurse practitioners for many years.

As a profession, we’re very fortunate to have attorneys like Nick and Melanie supporting NP practice in California.

Highly recommend. Thank you!!

Nick and his team helped me set up my S Corp as a PMHNP, and I’m so glad I found them. They’re incredibly skilled, professional, and made something that initially felt overwhelming feel easy. They handled everything smoothly, and their communication was top-notch — every email was responded to quickly and clearly, which made me feel supported the entire way through.

What really stands out most is how kind and trustworthy they are. I know I can come to them anytime I need legal advice (I love patient care, the legal aspect is such a hastle) and it is nice to get honest, thoughtful guidance that’s tailored to healthcare professionals like me. It’s rare to find a legal team that understands both the legal side and the clinical world - but they do, and it shows :)

If you’re starting your own practice or just need solid legal support in the healthcare space, I can’t recommend them enough. They’ve made a lasting impact on my journey as a provider, running my own practice/ S corp and I’ll continue to send other NPs and colleagues their way! Thank you all again for the support.

Not content with how much I was charge for consultation, I was told $375 but before starting I asked her off the bat right going in how much are you charging for your service she said well let's have a seat I said maybe she's going to tell me how much. Questions led after another question and then she tells me $2500 am like what?! I mean that's why I asked from the start she could have told me $2500+ we didn't have to discuss anything further. But $375 for 30 minutes?! No thank you and plus everything she told me I already knew there was nothing she said to me that was news to me. When there is people that make this kind of money on a 2 day of work.
reviews.ownerResponse: Due to Attorney/Client Privilege, I am not able to address the content of our conversation in this space. Nevertheless, I am sorry that you did not find the consultation worthwhile. Please know that I am unable to provide a quote for services before the consultation only because it is important to me to discuss a potential client’s unique situation thoroughly in order to assess all possible options and any potential challenges that could impact the fee. Additionally, the $375 consultation fee is always deducted from the fee for services once that amount is determined and an agreement is signed. I will be emailing you offline to further address the situation.

reviews.text: This is a review about Geri Kahn (Atty at law) and her staff Toni Dine.  I strongly/highly recommend her law firm.  After being denied my application for disability benefits, I was recommended to her by my fellow veteran in the armed forces.  She reviewed and took my case for appeal.  She and her staff were attentive to my needs and took their time to talk and walk through my case.  They are meticulous to everything in gathering all necessary materials for submission and wanted to make sure we succeed.  We were expecting quite sometime before we heard anything.  It did not take so long, and we won our case expeditiously (case by case basis).  All because their team knows what they are doing and is highly competent.  If you need someone to represent you in Social Security Benefits or immigration, The law office of Geri Kahn is the one that you need.  Compassionate, understanding, giving you time of the day, and speaking to you whenever necessary is who they are.  You can never go wrong with their successful team if you are being represented by them.  They are winners.  Best of the best.  I give them five stars and two thumbs up.
Ms. Kahn filed my brothers Social Security Disability application and completed the process at a most timely pace.

I give Geri Kahn the highest recommendation for anyone who is seeking help with the complicated process of applying for social security disablility.From the first day I hired Geri she listened carefully and with concern to whatever problems I presented and guided me thru my social security disability application.Geri and her assistant Gayle kept me up to date on the progress of my case and returned all my phone calls promptly.Anyone who hires Geri will see she is a professional and her only concern is to do right by her client.Lastly my disability application was approved and I am so happy I hired Geri as my lawyer!

Having been injured at work and being let go after working there for 20 years because I filed for Workers Comp (WC) were the darkest points of my working career.  In my experience, filing for WC was a big discouragement given that I’ve learned big corp. usually would fire injured workers to avoid paying for the medical/financial benefits that are due to them. They would also strip you of the retirement benefits that you’ve worked for over the years.  Unfortunately, all these things happened to me. Thank God for Super Lawyer Lisa Ivancich and her great staff for bringing justice to my case.  I’m forever grateful for her tenacity, knowledge, and hard work in representing and settling my case favorably.  While filing for WC/SIBTF took years to settle, Lisa and her staff were always there for me.  Lisa is not only a Super Lawyer, she is also a wonderful person who listens and understands where I was coming from.  She would not give you high hopes, but she and her staff gave their best in getting the medical/financial benefits that I truly deserved.  Thank you, Lisa and staff for everything.  I really appreciate your hard work, empathy, and caring over the years.  I will miss you and your staff.  If you need a competent and great lawyer,  I highly recommend Lisa and staff and the Ivancich & Costis lawfirm.

Did not want to leave this type of review but with the experience I just encountered with this firm, they left me no choice. This review is based off my own personal experience with representatives of this firm.

I had a telephone appointment scheduled with this firm and had to reschedule due to becoming extremely ill. I rescheduled the second appointment for two weeks later, however I was admitted to the hospital shortly after I rescheduled the appointment. I was in the hospital for over a week which caused me to miss my appointment. I could not call or talk due to medical issues.

As soon as I was discharged, I called the firm and received no answer. I then received a letter in the mail stating they could not represent me but with no explanation as to why. I sent a detailed email to a representative of the firm explaining my circumstances and why I missed the appointment.

I received a call from the representative a few days later and was told because I “no showed” to my appointment, it caused the firm to miss appointments with other potential clients. The representative confirmed the reason they were not representing me was because I “no showed” for my appointment.

I asked the representative if this was still the case given my situation, to which this person replied, “yup, we’re not representing you.” I determined this employee was not trying to hear anything I had to say, so I said thank you and we disconnected.

This firm lacks compassion and understanding and is as unprofessional as it gets. I absolutely understand time is valuable and appointments should be for potential clients who are serious about their case and want to be heard.

However, I had absolutely no control over getting sick at the time I did nor did I have control over the severity of it putting me in the hospital. It was not my intention to “no show,” but to refuse to represent me because I missed a telephone appointment due to serious medical reasons is as unethical as it gets.

At this point, I’m just glad I saw the unprofessionalism right away.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry we were not able to meet with you and we hope you have recovered from your illness. Due to the high volume of calls and meetings in our office, we do have a policy where we won’t meet with clients who have missed two appointments without a prior explanation. The staff person you spoke with didn’t remember your conversation the same and we are sorry if there was a miscommunication.
