reviews.text:
Everything about them is poor quality.  It took them 4 months after I filled out the agreement that they would represent me, that I received a today, (3/13/2021) letter stating that they won't represent me.

Since I was unable to get any response from them, I fired them a month ago.  Not two weeks ago they told me to contact them after a QME appointment and we would go from there.  They have no concept of professionalism.  I also think is has to do with that I am male.  I have heard a lot of complaints from males who have had the same result.

Run for you lively hood.  They will leave you to die with no remorse.

Having professionally contested cases against both Lisa and Athena, I can honestly say that they, the other attorneys in their office, and their staff, are exceptional representatives for injured workers.  Although tremendous advocates for their clients, both Lisa and Athena are still very pleasant and easy to work with.  They and their great staff are very responsive to inquiries (but don't make too many--they're very busy!), and they resolve problems very quickly.  In my experience, they go beyond the normal range of advocacy found in a workers' compensation attorney, persistently pressing and pushing for every possible advantage and benefit for their clients.  Highest recommendation.
Awesome
Awesome awesome awesome. Just be patient and it will work in your favor
Nice people but late for the appointment.

This place's customer service  sucks we needed advice and representation they left us waiting and the waiting room for 45 minutes when we had an appointment and we're on time we did not feel that they really cared about our case and where very inconsiderate. Felt like this place is just all about the money maybe if you have a big case easy to win with a lot of money an pay out they might treat you better, your average Joe who doesn't know anything coming off the street and needs some help they treat you like you are beneath them.. I do not recommend them find yourself a real lawyer who genuinely cares.
Very good Workers Comp & Social Security Lawyers.

Lisa Ivancich has been my lawyer for over two years. Lisa and her staff are a great group of people. Real good communication they, explain everything as thoroughly as they can. If you have questions there are readily available by email, phone, or text to snswer whatever your questions are. Lisa is great and accommodating to your needs as a client, and she understands the complicated legal system and breaks it down for you in a way you can understand. It has been a great experience having her represent my workers comp case.
Good attorneys.

I can't say enough about Lisa Ivancich & the whole group. They were so on top of everything. I felt so comfortable with Lisa, I felt the trust instantly when I met her.  She is very personable, kind, sympathetic  & really in tuned with what ever I said and talked about.  I have referred many people to her. She is totally awesome.   She will always be # 1 in what she was meant to do.  Thank you to you and your Awesome  group!!!
Best Wrongful Termination/Employment Attorney in Antioch!

Was not able to take my case as my issue wasn't in his line of expertise but Mr. Roscha was very friendly and returned my call after initial VM within minutes and gave me better direction as to where I can find an attorney for my case. Thank you

A friend referred me to the Law Office of Ariel Brownell.  I was in need of an attorney to help guide me through divorce and custody issues.  From our first meeting to our last phone conversation, Ariel and her team helped guide me through one of the most difficult times of my life.  It can be daunting to navigate legal issues but having Ariel as my attorney, provided much-needed peace of mind.   I always felt like my case was her number one priority.  If I had questions, the responses came quickly.  I could not be more pleased with my decision to retain her services.  Thank You Ariel!

If you’re looking for someone who will fight for you with integrity, clarity, and compassion...Ariel is the one.

From the very first consultation, Ariel didn’t just tell me what I wanted to hear, she told me what I needed to hear. Her honesty, attention to detail, and unwavering focus gave me the strength and clarity I needed to move forward during one of the most difficult times in my life. I was facing a DVRO case that could have shaken everything, but Ariel brought peace, strategy, and certainty.

She prepped me so thoroughly that I didn’t even need to take the stand. We were ready from every angle, and that level of preparation was unmatched. She protected me and my family, and that’s something I’ll never forget. She doesn’t just show up as an attorney, she shows up as someone who truly cares about you as a human being.

Her team, Rebecca, Jocelyn, and Derick were an extension of that same energy. Every single one of them was professional, communicative, and made sure I felt supported the entire way through. You’re not just hiring a lawyer with Ariel, you’re gaining an elite team that’s aligned, intentional, and built to win with integrity.

Thanks to Ariel, I can finally focus on healing, growing, and becoming the best version of myself. She walked with me through every step of this storm, and because of her, I came out stronger.

If you’re in need of legal help and want someone who leads with both excellence and heart, Ariel is as good as it gets. Forever grateful.

I feel like Ariel let me shoot myself in the foot because I didn't know what I was doing and she didn't take a strong position in my favor. Unfortunately I didn't read my ex's disclosure until years later to find out there was a large retirement account I didn't know about. It made my overly generous offer even more unbalanced. Its a shame Ariel didn't bring it to my attention.

This was the hardest time of my life, loosing all my money, taking on so much debt, and raising a baby by myself. Ariel's only advice was "just take 3 months off of work so we can have a more advantageous disclosure." That was completely impractical advice.

Then, she has the nerve to email me after posting this review and "remind me that I only hired her for a limited scope." I guess $8790 is limited scope.

Now, every month I make exorbitant spousal support payments while paying the minimum on mountains of debt and I wish I had gotten better advice.

In short, The Law Office Of Ariel Brownell is the law office that you want if you are looking for a knowledgable, detail oriented, honest, and tenacious law team.  I would recommend The Law Office Of Ariel Brownell for your divorce and domestic violence cases.  Ariel and Rebecca are awesome!

In detail, I had a complicated divorce and domestic violence case that started in June 2023.  Ariel accepted my divorce case and was able to help me get exactly what I wanted, with sanctions against the opposing side.  Rebecca handled my domestic violence case, and this is where I really appreciated the advice of the law team at Ariel's office.  On the day of my domestic violence hearing before trial, the opposing side wanted to settle.  Out of care and concern for me, Ariel and Rebecca encouraged me to proceed for my safety and protection.  Im so glad I listened.  We were successful in securing a 4 year restraining order and I was awarded all lawyer fees.  It took a year and a half but it was worth the wait.

I was totally satisfied with my representation and I would recommend The Law Office Of Ariel Brownell.  I want to send a big THANK YOU to Derick, Jocelyn, Rebecca, and Ariel, I appreciate the first class assistance you provided to me and I will be forever grateful.

I have had the privilege of having Rebecca Jones represent me throughout my post-divorce hearings and any other issues where legalities were involved concerning my divorce.  She is excellent and very professional!  She impresses me every time we are in court because she definitely knows law and will do everything she can to make sure my case is heard and explained and I feel she has my back each and every day.  Rebecca is so great about getting ahead of issues which she knows can arise, so she will reach out to me, for instance, before a court hearing, to make sure we have everything aligned for an upcoming trial, response, etc.  I can always count on her to return my calls, texts, and emails in a timely manner and she’s very thorough when answering questions which proves she’s an amazing listener and communicator.  I couldn’t get through this without her and I’m so lucky to have found her a little over a year ago!  Thank you, Rebecca, for all your hard work and diligence!

I cannot recommend Ariel highly enough. Going through a divorce is never easy, but having Ariel as my attorney made all the difference. From day one, she was always available when I needed her, no matter how tense or overwhelming the situation became. My case was quite complex, with multiple situations and challenges happening at once, yet Ariel was able to navigate everything with precision and discernment. She had a remarkable ability to assess each aspect carefully and determine the best outcome for me, even in the most complicated moments. I’ll be forever thankful for her guidance and expertise during such a difficult time.

Ariel not only approached my case with incredible professionalism, knowledge, and a straightforward, business-minded focus that gave me confidence in her abilities, but she also showed a level of empathy and kindness that I never expected from a divorce attorney. She understood the emotional toll I was going through and was able to provide the emotional support I needed without ever compromising on her sharp legal expertise.

I made a comment to Ariel during the process that I was grateful I had hired her before my ex-husband did. To my surprise, she responded by saying that she vets all of her clients carefully and, more than likely, would not have taken him on. I deeply appreciate that Ariel is discerning in who she represents, choosing to support clients who come from a place of integrity and genuine intent. This thoughtful approach reassured me that I was not just another case, but someone she believed in and was willing to advocate for.

I’ve since referred her to many people, including a close friend who is still grateful to this day. If you’re looking for someone who will fight for you while also genuinely caring about you as a person, Ariel is the attorney you want on your side.

Ariel seemed like a really smart attorney, but it was $700 down the drain just to hear her tell me she couldn't take on my case. Lawyers should have some ethics in their practices when it comes to consults and not just use that as a way to bait clients they have no intention of serving. To give more detail, I had first scheduled a consult with Ariel and she proceeded to inform me how my case might go, while also giving me the incorrect sense that I could easily win greater than 50/50 custody. She said she couldn't take my case on at the time but she would have more time in the next month. So I waited and scheduled another consult for the next month, this time an hour long to go into more detail. When we had our second consult, she informed me of things we had already discussed on the first consult, then at the end told me I should go with a larger firm since theirs wasn't equipped for a complex case like mine. What a waste of time and money. She should have made that decision during my first consult. I would stay away from this firm if you think your case will be anything but an easy amicable divorce. Also, her assistant takes days/weeks to get back to your question, so don't expect quick replies.

Divorce is a horrible thing.  It is filled with turmoil, angst, frustration…fear.  At least that is how it was for me.  I found Ariel by chance.  I think I just Googled, “divorce attorneys, Walnut Creek”.   I live out of state, so I needed an attorney who was willing to work with me long distance.
In Ariel, I found a true advocate.  She always looked after me, guided me away from my bad instincts and decisions, helped me navigate the irritation of opposing counsel.  She was patient with me, which is saying a lot.
I would and have recommended her to a friend and I would strongly suggest that you call her if you need an advocate during a divorce.  She truly was amazing.

What can I say about Ariel Brownell Lee?
As I have never been through a divorce, I had high anxiety about finding a perfect fit.  After much research I found Ariel.

I was always at ease and comfortable when speaking with her because she was professional, patient, empathetic, compassionate, thorough and answered every question or concern I had.

I appreciated her straight forward approach.  She is meticulous about what documents are needed and in explaining each process of the divorce proceedings.  Ariel’s team is just as meticulous.

I would absolutely recommend Ariel Brownell Lee.  So it is imperative for a client to do their due diligence because she is going to work hard to get the best results possible.  She will also prepare you for other scenarios.

Today, she gave me the best news ever which is I am now divorced.  I am thankful and grateful for everything she and her team did for me.

My experience with the law office of Ariel Brownell was more than STELLAR! Navigating a divorce is hard enough but my lawyer-REBECCA HARRIS JONES, held it down for me !!! She was super knowledgeable about the court system, insightful, and fair. Most importantly she was accessible ! She answers calls and emails  efficiently and to me as a client that was very important! She is a great listener and will do her best to get you the best outcome! If she did it for me she can do it for you!

My case was very complicated but she walked me patiently through  every step! I am indebted to her because I was  able to become more financially independent post divorce  and I was able to secure custody of both of my precious children which was my desire ! Please call and ask for Rebecca Harris Jones !She will get the job done and have your ex’s teeth chattering every time they get a document request from her office !

When you actually hate that the divorce is over -only because you don’t get to talk to your lawyer anymore -you KNOW you’ve had a great lawyer!  I could really go on and on! Thanks Rebecca!!!!!

Rebecca Jones has been absolutely amazing throughout her time representing me. She's very easy to work with and has great communication skills. Furthermore, Rebecca was diligent about staying connected with me and ensuring all my needs were met.

I would recommend Ariel Brownell and Rebecca Jones, with the highest regard, to anyone looking for trustworthy and dependable counsel.
Ariel was a delight to work with. I found her to be incredibly knowledgeable, patient, and understanding. No brainer.

Ariel and her team are the best of the best! I couldn’t be happier with the service I received and the resolution of my case. I was fortunate to have a very collaborative divorce, but that doesn’t make the process less daunting. Ariel and her team were responsive and thorough, making the process as painless as possible. I interviewed a few lawyers before partnering with Ariel, and I believe I made the best decision by choosing her. During my case, her team expanded, and everyone I interacted with was as professional and courteous as she was. She also helped me find other support services, and in the end, my new home loan advisor and estate attorney were her recommendations, and they were fantastic. Ariel’s extensive network is a huge bonus and is just another example of why I will recommend her firm without hesitation.  I never thought I’d be the type of person who could brag about how great their lawyer is, but here we are. 😊

As someone who recently went through an arduous divorce, I cannot emphasize enough how fortunate I was to have hired an exceptional attorney to guide me through the process. From start to finish, Ariel Brownell displayed unparalleled professionalism, compassion, and legal acumen that exceeded all my expectations. I couldn’t have done it without Ariel and her team.

Ariel is a fantastic, professional, and tenacious lawyer that really has your interests as a client in full precision. She was really great to work with, responsive, and detail oriented. Highly recommend her for any potential future clients.

Where do I begin.  Going through a divorce is already bad enough, then you have to pick a lawyer.  Luckily for me, Ariel came highly recommended from a friend of mine.  Long story short, I was ready to give up "the farm" to make the divorce as easy and painless as possible.  Ariel stopped me dead in my tracks and said "NO", we will offer this and that's all she will get.  Well, Ariel was right on the money.  I was able to keep what was rightfully mine and I'm so grateful to have her in my corner.  She was always a pleasure to deal with, always professional and courteous and never backed down to opposing counsel.  I highly recommend Ariel and her team to anyone who needs the best lawyer in Contra Costa County.
Ariel is intelligent, professional, and passionate about her work.

Ariel was an absolute pleasure to work with! She's very knowledgeable, responsive, and patient.

I have never had to hire legal services before (it's intimidating!) but Ariel made the whole process very easy and she was great at explaining everything to me. She definitely had my best interests in mind and was honest with me while we were drafting/reviewing my document.

10/10 would hire again!

I highly recommend Ariel, she is professional, responsive and extremely knowledgeable. She is trustworthy and has a sincere practice as well as high interest in helping her clients with their desired outcomes. Her rates are affordable and she prides herself on the honesty of her work ethic. Thank you Ariel🙏🙏🙆‍♀️

I had a wonderful experience working with Ariel Brownell! I thought that my ex-husband and I could handle updating our child custody agreement ourselves, and quickly realized that we needed an attorney involved. Ariel helped us come up with a much better agreement quickly and was great at diffusing issues before they became hostile situations. Overall very pleased and will use her again the next time our custody agreement needs to be updated.

Ariel is the best attorney in the area! I had a great experience and support with Ariel!
Ariel is intelligent, responsible, ethical and well-knowledge when it comes to any  family legal matter. She always makes herself available when I need her the most. Ariel is the support any family needs when facing difficult situation. Thank you Ariel for everything you had done to help my family.

Ariel was the absolute best lawyer I could have received for my divorce. She immediately took control over my case with confidence and care. She was easy to communicate with. Always answered all my questions quickly.
I truly enjoyed reading her statements she made for me.  The eloquence of her writing shows her intelligence and deep knowledge of the law.
I would recommend Ariel to any person going through the difficult journey of divorce.

I will try to keep this short and to the point. I divorced a few years ago and until Ariel, still having issues with my ex taking me to court for anything and everything.  It was a way of bullying me and I knew this time I needed help. I started looking for lawyers , reading reviews and praying for  the perfect fit, and I found the perfect lawyer.  I will say this, Ariel is fair, realistic and will guide you with care.  Ariel will try to settle things outside of court best she can and I never felt she was " stalling "  to get a bigger pay day.  Not going to lie, I have come across of few lawyers like that.
Let's be honest, getting divorced is a vulnerable journey and I am grateful I had/ have a lawyer who understood and understands that.  Thank you Ariel for working hard for and with me.  Thank you for making me feel safe and cared for.

There are not enough words to express my gratitude toward Ariel for all that she's done for my son and I. During one of the most difficult times in my life, she was not only knowledgeable but  also extremely professional and compassionate. Always willing to go the extra mile for her clients. She made sure to always keep me informed so I would never have to question what was going on and no matter the day or time I never had a problem getting a hold of her. She made sure she was readily available to me at all times. Ariel's knowledge of family law coupled with her level of integrity and compassion for her clients is what makes her such an incredible attorney. I would 100% recommend her to anyone in need. You couldnt make a better choice in representation and our win today was a true testament to her hard work and dedication.Thanks again for everything Ariel your help has been invaluable to me!!!!
Ariel guided me through a murky process.  She advocated for me and gave me the facts.  I would user her services again in a heartbeat.
Ariel is amazing, knowledgeable and has been a huge asset to my family during our journey with the court system. I highly recommend her.
Ariel is compassionate, pragmatic, knowledgeable and tenacious.
My case was an uphill battle,  but with Mr Wilbrand I was able to win my appeal and receive my benefits
Attorney John Willbrand was very helpful, efficient and thorough. He helped me successfully challenge an overpayment request from Social Security Disability.
Mr Willbrand was able to resolve my social security disability case quickly and efficiently. His staff were very professional.
He's Awesome

I chose John Willbrand as my Social security, disability case.He was thorough
And won my case quickly and continues to give me answers I may have concerning my Rights.I was his first client with
Fibromyalgia/ Chronic fatigue syndrome.
30+ years ago! These Attorneys only take 25% in fees,rather than other Attorneys that charge 33 1/3.Ive suggested him to many people,that have used his services with total success.Thank you Mr.Willbrand,
Sincerely,Debra Dinatale Knorr
he was my attorney
Very helpful and very Extremely experienced, Thank you for getting me awarded for permanent disability on the first appearance.
Entire staff is super friendly. They are a no nonesense family affair.

Absolutely the worst experience I have ever had with a lawyer. I was about two minutes into explaining my reasoning for needing a lawyer when the secretary handed the phone off to John Willbrand. I did not ask to speak with a lawyer, I was simply trying to ascertain if his law office would be an appropriate choice. John was VERY aggressive on the phone with me. Over the course of a few minutes I believe he only let me complete 1 sentence. In so many words he laughed at my case and told me it wasn’t worth his time, then abruptly hung up. I don’t know how someone can treat a potential client like that and call themselves a professional. I would strenuously recommend avoiding this law office unless you believe you are owed A LOT of money.

I have been remiss in not writing a review for Mr. Willbrand.  He is straightforward with you, and will tell you the truth about your chances.  My case was mainly a osteoarthritis case, one of the tougher types to win.  He helped me develop strategy, including using an outside therapists report, to help me win. This cost me a bit out of pocket but worth every cent considering what was at stake.  He put me at ease and advised me how to behave in the hearing.  Highly recommended!
Honest and amazing man with superb integrity and knowledge. Best your gonna find out there who is there for your best well being.
Awesome social security lawyer
Great experience Very helpful
John is a great attorney. I would recommend him to help you through the SSI process.
He's great at what he does.

Simon was great to work with — honest and approachable. These situations are hard and take time, but he was always informative and provided regular updates throughout the process.

He explained in detail how insurance companies work and what we were up against, and we had a successful result, which made a very stressful situation much easier to handle. I am extremely grateful for his dedication and would confidently recommend him to anyone in need of legal representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Monica, thank you so much for sharing this thoughtful review. We’re glad to hear that Simon’s guidance, communication, and support helped make a difficult process feel more manageable. Knowing you felt informed and cared for every step of the way truly means a lot to our team. We appreciate your trust in us and your recommendation, and we’re grateful to have been able to help you reach a successful outcome.

reviews.text: Great service, professional, friendly and knowledgeable. Whenever I called or emailed they returned my call or email in a timely manner, if not immediately.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your much appreciated review! We are glad that we were able to provide a great service. If you ever need us again, do not hesitate to reach out.

reviews.text: Very professional attorneys & staff. Thank you very much for a good outcome with my case to Simon, Hilda & everyone at Wells Call. 👍👍👍👍👍
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to share your experience! We’re thrilled to hear that you’re satisfied with the outcome of your case. Simon, Hilda, and the entire Wells Call Injury Lawyers team are grateful for your trust in us. If you ever need assistance in the future, don’t hesitate to reach out.

reviews.text: Professional and courteous from start to finish.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words, Chauncy! It was a pleasure working with you.

reviews.text:
I have worked with this law firm over 10 yrs.  I have only dealt with Steve Clawson and his secretary Kori.  They both have been heloful as well as putting my mind at ease. Even tho Steve only deals with personal injuries, I can esalways call him for amything and if he can not help or does not know he will point me into.the right direction.  So if anyone reading this you can put your trust and problems into Steve Clawsons hands.  He will do his absolute best to help and guide you. I have been to other attormeys and did not get what was best for me or the customer service that I deserved.  Thank you Steve for everyting you have done for me as well as making calls and writing letters on my behalf that you did not have to do.  YOU ALWAYS GO ABOVE AND BEYOND FOR ME.

Kimberly Polen
Thank you Mr. Scofield, i high recommend his office, they handled my case professionally and were very helpful in answering all my questions
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Ileana! It was a great pleasure working with you. So glad you were happy with our firm's work on your case!

reviews.text: Started my case with Mr. Schofield almost exactly a year ago and was able to finalize an amazing outcome extremely fast. Communication was 10/10 through the whole thing. I never had to worry about the status of my case and they always made sure to ask if I had questions. I highly recommend this office for anyone looking for reliable and professional lawyers. I couldn’t have asked for a better experience.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind review. It was a pleasure working with you.

reviews.text: Steve is awesome! He was very helpful, professional, and we definitely recommend him! Thank you so much!
reviews.ownerResponse: It was a great pleasure to help you and your mother.  Your kind words are so appreciated. Steve

reviews.text:
He's a very good lawyer, I highly recommend him. They helped me with my case.
Attorney Benjamin and his secretary.
They are very efficient. Highly recommended.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Mia. It was a pleasure helping you with your case.

reviews.text:
Very grateful to attorney Benjamin Scott for his support and help in advocating for our rights.
It was resolved in less time than we thought it would take.
When I had questions, he was there to help us clarify them.
Very grateful to him.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Cesia. It was a pleasure to help you with your accident case.

reviews.text: Wells, Call, Clark, Bennett & Clawson is an excellent law firm. They are easy to deal with, care about your case and its outcome, and work hard to get you everything you deserve.They are experienced in all areas of personal injury from car crashes to dog bites. You can depend on them to get you the best compensation for your injuries.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for your kind words. Glad we could make a difference.

reviews.text: Excellent service! They're always attentive to your case. Most of the lawyers and staff speak Spanish. They're efficient in resolving your problem.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Iris. It was a pleasure assisting you. We hope everything goes well for you.

reviews.text: They are a legit Law firm, they do all the work and I have gotten both Uber and Lyft settlements from them back in 2020.
it worked
I had a decent enough experience dealing with tidrick law, even if I never actually talked to a person.
It's hard to talk to a lawyer aka attorney in this law firm
They still haven't sent me my Postmates money at all no replays no nothing!!

This law firm is definitely a group of scam artist that works for the rideshare companies and not their supposed clients. After about 2 years of waiting they managed to secure a pathetic .40 (40 cents per ride) for me. In their own contract it states they would keep me updated with information regarding my cases every few months BUT NOT ONCE DID THEY PROVIDE ME WITH THESE UPDATES WHATSOEVER. Not once did they have questions for me about working for the rideshare company, they dont have a clue about how long i worked for the rideshare company nor how many miles I took passangers.

They have however managed to badger me with emails and phone calls every other day regarding their measly offer and I have proof of everything.

Stay as far away from this joke firm as possible.

-GDLC

They did the job and won cases regarding Uber and Lyft settlements. However, communication between them and myself as well as settlement administrators was poor. Caught them with a big mistake in check distribution decision. Ugh.
Very professional Law Firm.
Lyft has settled to pay me my share but I have been waiting for over five months now. When I contact their office, they tell me they are not responsible for the check issuing agent. I am stuck!!

Did exactly what they said they would! Was of course a bit wary of getting involved with any major class action case.

Hard to believe anyone is fighting the good fight anymore! But they delivered my postmates settlement check as promised!

5 stars to the Tidrick Team! Thank you 🙏🏽
The Tidrick law firm was great kept me up to date with good info
Luars.They said I was getting  $249 on my postmates case and all I received was $69

Just FINALLY received my Tidrick Law Firm vs Postmates check and it bounces? You would think they would make sure all their checks are good before sending them out. Now I have to figure out how and who to get in contact with to get the money I deserve
I had a very good experience with the law firm they always kept me up to. Date on the case I completely recommend them as lawyers for your legal affairs
But not responsive and communication was poor

I was in the courtroom when these lawyers were doing a class action trial against a company playing fast and loose with the labor law. I thought these lawyers were sharp persuasive and convincing. So did the jury. The jury verdict was unanimous for the workers. From beginning to end took years because the company wanted to settle for peanuts and the Tidrick Law lawyers said no way let’s keep fighting. So it took years but eventually the workers won and got paid. Before this experience I always heard you could only get a few bucks from a class action but here each of the worker got thousands! Faster would be better but sometimes like this the wait is definitely worth it.

Tidrick Law Firm represented us in a class action trial.  From what I saw from the attorney, and the support staff the entire team was on top of everything.  Mr. Tidrick himself was upbeat energetic and had great command over the Courtroom.  The most impressive part of Mr. Tidrick was the respect he was getting from the bench. When Mr. Tidrick cross examined the other sides witness stand, I'm not kidding when I say this he reminded me of Perry Mason.  He got them to admit some very important points.  Basically the witness had no way of escaping their lies and had to admit they did not know what hit them until it was too late.  We ultimately won the case as a party but the credit goes the Mr. Tidrick.  He is very sharp.  I also find Mr. Tidrick to be a genuine/honest person and you cant say that about to may lawyers these days.

I'm so grateful for the help I received.  Mainly from the "text" person I was texting.  I first lost my check, then requested another which they say they sent but I never received it  (we get our mail stolen regularly and have no lock on them).

The administrator stopped replying to me so I went back to the "text" person who was on it for me.  I'm so appreciative of whomever that was.  I finally received my check for Uber.

Thank you again you "text" person.  You rocked it.  Administrator not so much.  To simply stop communicating is a bad look. It took the "text" person to get the job done. Thank you again.
They provide what they promised!!
Huge scam company. they keep spamming my emails with BS offers. WATCH OUT FOLKS

I filed with them in July of 2019 for a Lyft settlement and received my check just two weeks ago and I was STOKED and I'm so appreciative. They have been extremely helpful and were transparent and extremely responsive, even all throughout the pandemic. They did ALL the hard work while I signed papers they sent over.

Man oh man they took so much bread from my case it ain’t funny at all man. Please do not I mean absolutely do not have them represent you in your case especially with ride-share companies. My lord they took more than  60 percent left me with nothing but my draws on. I messed up cause I didn’t read the reviews on this company. But if you happen to come across this you see why they got 2 stars straight up crooks.
Zero stars if possible.

Once again I'm writing a review.  My husband and I filed claims with Tidrick . As many others say, they send non stop emails with low ball offers. I finally get a call and accept an offer over the phone because I just want to be done with them and am tired of getting emails every day. Once I accept the offer I hear nothing from them. Went from getting conted every day  to not being able to get in touch with anyone !. I contacted Simpluris,the company that emailed me confirmation of my offer and today they told me I need to contact a company called Epiq because that's who was dealing with the case. Lies. reviews.text:
If you are reading this review, you are likely in the same position I was a few months ago: overwhelmed, stressed, and hesitant about the future. After a lot of research, I decided to contact Lincoln Law, and it was hands-down the best decision I could have made for my financial health and my peace of mind.
From the very first phone call, I noticed a difference in how I was treated. Unlike other firms that made me feel like just another case number, the team at Lincoln Law treated me with genuine compassion and zero judgment. They understood that good people can fall into difficult financial circumstances, and they focused entirely on the solution rather than the past.
The Consultation: I met with Carl R. Gustafson for my initial consultation. They were incredibly patient, taking the time to explain the nuances between Chapter 7 and Chapter 13. I never felt rushed. They looked at my specific assets, debts, and income, providing a clear and honest assessment of what to expect. They didn't just tell me what I wanted to hear; they told me what I needed to know to protect my future.
The Process & Communication: The paralegal team was outstanding. Bankruptcy involves a mountain of paperwork, which can be daunting. They provided a clear checklist of everything they needed from me and were always available to answer my questions—no matter how small. Communication was seamless; I was updated at every major milestone, so I never had to wonder where my case stood.
The Hearing: When it came time for the meeting of creditors, I was naturally nervous. However, Richard W Suh was right there with me, ensuring I was prepared for every question. Their presence and expertise made a potentially intimidating experience feel routine and manageable. It was clear that they are highly respected by the trustees and the court staff, which gave me even more confidence.
The Result: Today, my discharge has been granted, and the weight that has been on my shoulders for years is finally gone. I have a clear path forward and a second chance that I didn't think was possible.
If you are looking for a firm that combines high-level legal expertise with true empathy and stellar communication, I cannot recommend Lincoln Law highly enough. They don't just file paperwork; they help people reclaim their lives. Thank you to the entire team for your hard work and for giving me a fresh start!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Annah, I am sorry that you had to bear that burden for years, but we are so happy to be here with you as it is lifted! Thank you for taking the time to share your experience. We often feel entombed in the paperwork of this process. It is wonderful to stand with you today at that top of the mountain and really appreciate the result.
Best wishes to you in whatever it is you decide to pursue next. And thank you so much for bringing a portion of the way that you now feel back to share with us!

Filing Chapter 7 was something I was extremely nervous about, but Lincoln Law truly made the entire process feel manageable and stress-free. From the very beginning, everything was clearly explained, and their online portal made uploading documents so easy no constant emails, no confusion. Communication was always timely and reassuring, which meant more to me than I can even explain during such a stressful time.

The process itself was far less intimidating than people make it seem. Once I submitted my paperwork and completed the 341 meeting, everything moved smoothly toward discharge. I honestly wish I had done this sooner instead of carrying so much worry and fear for so long.

My attorney, Carl, was incredible. He handled my case with professionalism, patience, and genuine care, and he turned a very difficult decision into one of the best, most relieving choices I’ve ever made. I’m truly grateful to Lincoln Law and highly recommend them to anyone who needs guidance and support through this process.

A Champion in My Corner: How Thomas Daly Guided Me to a New Life

When addiction once again landed me in the court system, I was facing what felt like the absolute worst moment of my life. I reached out to Thomas Daly Law for a consultation, and from that very first call, Thomas was refreshingly honest and straightforward. He didn't just tell me what I wanted to hear; he laid out the realities of my situation and, incredibly, was willing to work with me on payments. This immediate understanding and flexibility were a huge relief during a incredibly stressful time.

What truly sets Thomas apart, however, is his genuine care and commitment. While I was in residential treatment a month later, he called to check in on me. He continued to do so throughout my six months of outpatient recovery. This wasn't just professional courtesy; it felt like true support, a consistent lifeline reminding me that I wasn't alone in this fight.

When my court date finally arrived, the anxiety was almost unbearable. I was terrified, biting my nails, and felt like I was on the verge of falling apart. But deep down, amidst the fear, I held onto the certainty that I had the best attorney possible. I knew Thomas would secure the absolute best results.

And he did. Thomas's legal prowess was evident in the courtroom. He thoroughly questioned the officer, meticulously reviewed every detail of the video evidence, and guided me with unwavering confidence. I, in turn, dedicated myself entirely to my part of the process. I gathered every letter, certificate, and proof of continued recovery. My boss, coworkers, sponsor, and friends all showed up to support me, a testament to the fact that I was truly living a life of recovery.

Today, I am nearly two years sober, and I am overflowing with happiness and gratitude. Thomas helped me achieve the results I prayed for – an outcome that, at one point, seemed incredibly slim and almost unrealistic. He is smart, knowledgeable, and knows exactly how to navigate the complex legal system. He doesn't just represent you; he guides, helps, and supports you every step of the way.

I trust Thomas Daly implicitly and truly hope I never need his services again. However, if any of my loved ones – my brother, my child, or anyone close to me – ever found themselves in need of an attorney, Thomas Daly would be the first name that comes to mind.

Thanks to Thomas, I'm still employed, actively involved in helping others through recovery, and getting my life back on track. Spiritually, I am the best version of myself, and I genuinely like the person I've become. Sometimes, I wonder if this entire challenging experience was meant to happen, to finally show me that recovery must be the most important thing in my life. I am eternally grateful for everyone who supported me, including the incredible Thomas Daly. I'm keeping my word, and I simply cannot say enough good things about him. Thank you, Thomas.

I highly recommend Tom Daly for anyone in need of legal representation. From the start, I found him to be incredibly knowledgeable and he clearly explained the legal process to me. He's also very friendly and approachable, which made a stressful situation much easier to navigate. Tom is exceptionally efficient and his work is truly outstanding – I am 100% pleased with the results he achieved in my case. On top of all that, his fees are very reasonable. If you want an experienced attorney who delivers excellent results, hire Tom Daly.

Turn out there were no heroes but zeros. In order to 'save their faces, they nit-picked whatever they saw in my house, like child endangerment because I did not lock up the cannabis I use in the drawer. Made-up stories so they did not look as stupid. I was in shock, the lead officer told me in person that there was no crime in front of my face, but when he returned back to the office, he wrote a report to charge me for child endangerment. That was how I got to know Thomas Daily, he was a great lawyer, he explained to me that this was, unfortunately, our messed up legal justice system.He helped me greatly, I cannot thank him anymore. If you are a victim of police misconduct or set up by the police, you have to come to Thomas Daily. You will be glad that you did.

Dude is nothing short of outstanding. I hired him in June 2020 for dui charge that I had from back 2012. It was my 3rd dui at the time and I’d had a warrant out for it for over 7 years. I knew with certainty the DA was wanting to throw the book at me and that was the case. I lived with the fear of this hanging over my head for 7 years, as well as not having a license and dealing with the matter showing up on background checks, and yes I know this was my own fault. I finally decided to handle the matter and pay my dues which was most likely going to be a year in jail and another 3 years without a license because the conviction would trigger an additional 3 years of suspension. I prepared to accept this as the consequence of me not handling the matter for so long. I contacted my previous lawyer Dan O’Malley from the firm O’Connor Runckle and O’Malley law firm. O’Malley was extremely rude to me even though I was a previous client and he painted a total doom and gloom picture to me and that there wasn’t much he was going to be able to do given the circumstances. I decided to look for a 2nd opinion and man am I glad i did!!!! I reached out to Mr. Daly and it was night and day. He was friendly and did not make me feel judged at all. Once I explained my situation he immediately set forth formulating his game plan which was to get the case dismissed completely. I’ll be honest I had no faith in that happening at all but his confidence and demeanor made me feel a little bit at ease for the first time in 7 years even though I was convinced there wasn’t much he was going to be able to do. Over the next few weeks Thomas always checked in with me and kept me up to date with what he was doing and what he needed from me. He was consistent with his outstanding and personable treatment of me. I was never left wondering what was going on and his confidence in what he was going to do never wavered and my fear and anxiety actually eased over the weeks even though I was getting closer and closer to judgment day. Approximately 7 weeks after I retained Daly I get a call from him letting me know he got the DA to somehow some way dismiss my case AND dismiss probation and the probation violations. EVERYTHING COMPLETELY GONE AND DONE WITH! I had to keep pinching myself to make sure it was real. For the first time in 7 years I have my life back, nothing hanging over my head and my license all because of Thomas Daly. If you are considering hiring an attorney I seriously urge you to look no further. The guy was top notch in every way imaginable. Would give 500 stars if possible.

I am very satisfied for the service that Atty. Thomas Daly provided to my case. He was transparent and very responsive. He was able to help me out dismissed the case under my name. Highly recommended. FIVE STAR.

He keeps it honest and keeps his word.

﻿I wanted to take a moment and share my experience with Stefanie West. Stefanie was referred to me by a friend and I am immensely glad that she did. I had planned on updating my Trust and had been putting it off when my health took a huge turn. When things settled down a bit, I knew my Trust was first and foremost on my to do list. I reached out to Stefanie who took me under her wing. We spoke a few times to get everything in order and eventually met in person at my home. From the start to finish the process was handled swiftly and with such care for what I was going through health wise. I highly recommend Stefanie West for any Trust needs you may have…you won’t be sorry for she is wonderful.
Patricia Stark

Setting up a trust seemed like so much work I kept putting it off. I finally used google to search for a good trust attorney with "local" and "female owned" as key parameters. I reached out to Stefanie West and was immediately impressed. She responded quickly and was very supportive of how to start the process. Even after I delayed several more months, she was welcoming and understanding. We met twice and she was absolutely lovely to work with. She listened, advised, explained and made me completely comfortable with it all. She then followed up with helpful emails to help me finish everything. I could not be more pleased with her services and truly feel like I could reach out anytime if I ever have any questions.

We couldn't have asked for a better Trust Attorney. Stefanie West is a warm and caring person. She is very knowledgeable and takes the time to explain the whole process. She was so easy to communicate with. She made the whole process of setting up a Trust less stressful. I highly recommend Stefanie West as your Trust and Estate planning Attorney!

We had our current estate trust redrafted with The Law Offices of Stefanie West, and the entire process was handled with clarity, professionalism, and genuine care. Stefanie was organized, efficient, and respectful of the fact that we came in already knowledgeable about trusts. She met us exactly where we were, offering thoughtful guidance and ensuring every detail aligned with our goals.

What really stood out was Stefanie’s personable air — she brings a warm, approachable presence to a field that can often feel formal or intimidating. Conversations with her felt easy and collaborative, and we always felt heard and supported. We even met her dogs and mom!

We’re grateful for the expertise and attention she brought to our estate planning, and we highly recommend her services to anyone seeking trustworthy, thoughtful legal guidance in estate planning.

When my situation had drastically changed because of several life events (retirement, becoming widowed, sold/bought house), I had basically to start from scratch with my estate planning. I feel fortunate to have found Stefanie to help me with that. Not only is she highly knowledgeable about all the legal intricacies, but she also made my problems her own and came up with scenarios I could never even have thought of. She did so much more than prepare documents. I am now confident that I did everything to make practical matters as convenient as possible for my loved ones when the time comes.
--------------------------------------------------------------
Stefanie has been absolutely exceptional. This is the second time I have worked with her on my estate planning, and once again she exceeded every expectation.

After I got married, my estate situation became significantly more complex. Stefanie guided me through every detail with remarkable clarity and patience, ensuring that nothing was overlooked and that all documents were fully aligned with my new circumstances. Her ability to explain sophisticated legal issues in plain, understandable language made the entire process stress-free.

What truly sets Stefanie apart is her combination of technical excellence and genuine care for her clients. She is meticulous, responsive, and deeply invested in delivering work of the highest quality. I felt completely confident that my family’s future is protected because of her diligence.

I would not trust my estate planning to anyone else. If you are looking for an attorney who is knowledgeable, thorough, and a pleasure to work with, I recommend Stefanie without hesitation.

There were plenty of estate planning attorneys my husband and I could have gone with to accomplish what we needed to accomplish (our estate planning is not complicated), but we chose Stefanie because we liked the approach she took to working with clients. We didn’t really see this as a one and done relationship, so we wanted someone that we could rely on over the years. She did an excellent job helping us create our will and living trust and I’ve been hounding all my friends to get their estate planning in order just so I can refer them to her. She’s super fair and reasonable, detail-oriented, extremely responsive (I’ve asked her so many random questions), and has a great personality to boot! Most people would see estate planning as an absolute chore (I mean, it is), but Stefanie somehow manages to make it enjoyable with her warm and engaging personality. It’s kind of unfortunate that she’s so efficient. It means I don’t have more reasons to see her in person and she’s super fun to talk to. HIGHLY recommend her. She’s amazing!

I have known Stefanie for over a decade; worked with her in partnership on a few projects involving seniors and committees. What started as a professional relationship soon evolved into one of admiration, trust and confidence.
I listened of how she spoke of her work, saw her dedication and attention to detail (above any charts!), and certainly value her expert advice. I would not hesitate to use her for my own or my family's needs (in fact, I have).
I saw scores of families relationship with Stefanie - all with endearments and trust. I remember a baby shower thrown for her (by clients) where they couldn't fit all her clients into the area provided. So many people wanting to share in her life.
The confidence one places in her will offer peace of mind while building a foundation for the future. She really breaks things down so you understand and creates an easier path for you to reach your goals.
You can choose any number of attorneys but can you find one who is calm, thorough, easy to talk with, honest, dedicated and kind? You can have all this with Stefanie.
I recommend you give her a call and see for yourself.

Creating a trust can be very demanding and we were so grateful that we were introduced to Stefanie by a friend to guide us through updating and amending our family trust. Her vast legal knowledge and expertise was evident as she led us through the various areas that were not covered sufficiently in our original trust. We have no hesitation in recommending her services to anyone. Not only was Stefanie a very fine attorney, but she is also a very warm and caring person.

What a great experience!! Stefanie was a wealth of information. Communication was timely. She talked with my husband and I was kind and understanding when discussing personal items. She is honest and caring and made the process so easy.

This started our search for an estate attorney.  We looked at several groups, but when we found Stefanie, we knew after our first conversation with her that she was the person we wanted to deal with.  She was direct and to the point and very personable.  After our first meeting, we knew we had made the right decision.  She was not only direct and to the point, but very knowledgeable in her field.  We were able to get our trust document written the way we wanted to do it.  Excellent!!!

We are so happy we are working with Stefanie and would highly recommend her to anyone who is wanting to complete a family trust document.

Stephanie West took good care of our family when preparing our trust. Before that, she carefully explained all that is involved in a trust, its importance and its process. I had Stefanie draw up my Trust in 2013 and she did an excellent job making sure everything was factored in and taken care of in the appropriate manner. I consulted a tax attorney, CPA, realtors, mortgage broker, etc. and she was the only one who did the research and advised me how to properly get it done.  She is responsive, smart, diligent, detail oriented, thorough, efficient and an all-around pleasure to work with.  I advise anyone who needs a Trust attorney to use Stefanie West.

Have you completed or updated your estate plan yet? Are you waiting or placing this item at the bottom of your to-do list because you think the task is daunting, time consuming and perhaps expensive?  Allow us to take this opportunity to share what an absolute wonderful experience we had with Estate Planning Attorney Stefanie West. Stefanie led us to a complete an incredibly thorough estate plan. May we suggest that you run, not walk, to schedule a visit with her about your custom needs.

We can’t say enough about how wonderful she is but here goes:  Stefanie is incredibly knowledgeable, an impeccable communicator, and a guide that you quickly learn to trust as she navigates you through this process. With her by your side you will successfully prepare and execute your estate plan. She is there from beginning to end and then some. Stefanie is our attorney for life and we sincerely hope that she becomes yours too!  Our estate plan is complete and we are happily astonished at how easy, efficient and fairly priced it was for our needs.

Stefanie West is a treasure—a real pro with integrity and honor.  Here’s why:  my wife and I spent almost an hour with Stefanie in her office going over our needs for a trust and a will, when we casually mentioned our plans to move out of California next year.
To our surprise, Stefanie told us she thought it really would be best not to use her services and suggested we wait until after we move and contact an attorney where we plan to live—someone with specific knowledge of their state’s statutes.  She said while the documents she would prepare for us would work, they may not optimally mesh with the laws of other states, and she didn’t want to risk preparing them for us only to later require us to redo them.
Of course she wanted our business, and to this point she had put in well over an hour of her time preparing for the meeting and meeting with us, but she didn’t think proceeding with our plan to work with her was in our best interest.  We know nothing about wills and trusts, and she could’ve charged us a fee just for the time she had put in, but she didn’t!
This is a woman who is knowledgeable, honest, ethical, and fair, and anyone seeking a trust attorney would be lucky to work with her!  I hope this feedback is helpful in making your choice of attorneys—in our book, Stefanie West is top notch!  George, Walnut Creek, California

Time spent talking with Stefanie West was easy, informative and supportive—just like sitting down with a best girlfriend. She is easy to talk to, has a great sense of humor, and is a down-to-earth person.  She is honest, real, and unpretentious.  Without hesitation, I would recommend her to assist you with your trusts, wills, and estate planning.  Lori, Walnut Creek, California
Amazing to work with; very patient and willing to explain anything we found confusing. Generous and kind, she went out of her way to make me feel comfortable and cared for!

reviews.text: KKG Law Offices was the blessing I needed for my situation. My case was slightly complex. It involved two DVTRO, a peaceful contact order, and I brought Karan on only two weeks before the TRIAL. Yep. Hearings were all said and done, opposing party was not budging on anything. Karan came on confident, compassionate, and brutally honest. Although things seemed hopeless to me, she had a sound strategy. She welcomed communication and always offered great responses that made me feel like we had this under control. Her team was just as responsive and professional. All of this gave me hope. And this is during the most stressful and scary time of my entire life. On the day of the trial I was tense. Karan was still confident and very to the point. In the courtroom she was pleasant and professional. Ultimately, I received a favorable outcome: I kept kept custody of my child and a protective order was put in place for me and my child. The money I paid was well spent. I know that I got an incredible price because I shopped around. And I believe that Karan accomplished what most other more expensive attorneys couldn't. I attribute this to her skill, dedication, drive to fight for what is right and honest. And she fought for my child, make no mistake. I wholeheartedly recommend KKG Law Offices.

reviews.text:
Grossly unprofessional, dishonest to say the least, it is criminal that she is still  practicing law.  I filed two complaints with the California Bar Association and will continue to pursue the matter until something is done.   There have been many other formal complaints against her.  Unfortunately, Attorney’s protect their own.

My complaints are too detailed to write in this post, but there are many  similarities to the other one star reviews that have been posted.

I hired Ms.gill to represent me a highly contentious divorce, and an upcoming trial in approximately six months later . The start of my demise began when Ms. Gill went on medical leave within a couple of weeks of hiring her, and delegated my case to one of her two associate attorneys.

Both attorneys quit within three months, resulting in no one preparing for my trial  until Ms.Gill  returned five months later, and only four weeks prior before trial.

Upon her return, we had a settlement conference with the Court , at which time she pleaded with the Court to postpone the trial for the second time.  The first request was made by her associate Attorney during her medical leave.  Ms.Gill argued she needed time to prepare being  she just returned from Medical leave, is still not one hundred percent well, and with a backlog of cases.  The Court was seemingly annoyed with the circumstances, and her lack of familiarity in particular, denied her request, and the trial remained on Calendar in four weeks.

In another conference shortly thereafter, Without my permission, Ms.Gill frivolously asked the Court to advance $45,000 from  a settlement trust fund  so  she could prepare for the imminent upcoming trial. Seemingly, now implying that she did not work on my case due to lack of funds.

Despite multiple multiple requests in writing, I did not receive any billing statements  from Ms..Gill until after  filing two formal complaints with the California Bar Association, and more than two years after my divorce was finalized.  There were multiple pages of frivolous charges, I presume the delay was due to her not keeping  any records during  the one month period of time I worked with her, and fabricated the vast majority of her charges.

In summary,  Ms.Gill left the office on medical leave shortly after retaining her services, and did not return to work until approximately one month prior to trial,  withheld more than $50,000.00 in funds, and represented me in trial completely unprepared, resulting in vast financial demise.

If anyone has ever been thrown into a family court matter, the county system is chaotic.
I was sent Carin's information as their highest recommendation by individuals who have knowledge of this realm of the court system, and I am so so happy that we listened to them.

Carin is extremely knowledgeable of the law, as well as the court system and it's nuances. This is invaluable when navigating how to respond or when to push. Having her represent me in the court room was always reassuring.

Carin is also very personable and kind. This process of going through family court was emotional and terrifying to say the least, but having Carin there to help talk me through the process and our plan, or giving me a call when she could sense I just needed some reassurance got me through it.

I would without hesitation recommend Carin and her team to anyone who has to go through this process.

Carin. Was God sent.She help me with my Case.When no one else would.Carin is very professional.She’s prompt on everything she does.Things that I  didn’t know nor understood she walked me through it. Carin helped me with a case and walked me through all the steps and was very informative through the while process.   She made herself available and was very professional and prompt when I used her. I received excellent service from Carin and highly reccomend her, I would use her again if the circumstances called for it.

I cant speak about her knowledge or work,  because she never bothered to keep her word to call me back. I contacted Carin a few weeks ago regarding a case and she was very responsive initially. Upon talking to her on the phone, I repeatedly  told her I was in a very desperate situation and also told her I would pay her through selling my vehicle. But she didn’t seem interested. She said she does not
drive to my residing county , yet in her website,  it clearly states she does take surrounding
Counties and she knew the supervising judge immediately when I asked her if she knew the name.  It appears she will only help people who she believes have a minimum income and social class. She never gave me the chance and clearly made a judgement that I wasn’t worthy or able to pay her, despite the fact that I was , until yesterday when I attempted to try to get a call back from her,  fully prepared to pay her- even before she began any case as retainer.  It’s hurtful because she assured me she would call me to follow up by end of that week. I even asked her if she was going to actually call back and she said yes. But she never kept her word. She hasn’t even had the decency to return any of the few messages I left for her. This was by far the part that brought me to write this review. The fact that she assured she’d follow up, and then can’t keep her word nor return a simple call.

Carin Johnson agreed to take my case when no one else would, the issue I had was such a gray area and after years of searching for someone, Carin
Agreed to help me, but was honest enough to explain that this was a very, very difficult situation, I wanted to write this review because Carin  is an accomplished attorney, but more than that I appreciate The genuinely decent good human being. She is,  and the empathy she shows for each individual situation is something that is hard to find, her associate attorney Bianca is also very good at what she does.

Peter was the sole reason that a criminal DUI case against me was dismissed. From the instant I had contact with the police, I was on the defensive despite not having done anything wrong. The police officer arrested me unfairly, without reading me my rights and without telling me that FSTs and PAS tests were all optional. Additionally, I was treated like an animal when having to give blood samples. All of this to stack the deck against me.

Peter handled everything and ensured that the DA at the county where I was arrested had nothing to work with. He brought the relevant expert witnesses to testify the poor and unhygienic conditions that my blood sample was taken. In the end, I had a DUI with multiple enhancements reduced down to a simple speeding ticket.

Thank you Peter for your help during this difficult time, I could not have made it without your help. For anyone needing services in DUI Defense, I highly recommend Peter and his team.

TEN Stars!  Peter is an accomplished author and an amazing trail lawyer.  It is no surprise to me that he was recommended by another attorney.  There are so many reasons to choose your representation carefully.  Do your research, and then make the right choice with Peter.  His expertise and prowess in the courtroom are the best investment you can make for yourself.   When the stakes are high and you cannot afford to lose, I fully recommend Peter Johnson.
My husband hired Peter and it was the best decision he’s ever made, my husband’s DUI was dropped! Peter is amazing!
After telling my story they said they couldn’t help me. Receptionist was kind of rude and hung up really fast. I’m like geesh
Peter did a fantastic job and will fight for you the whole way through! I wouldn't recommend anyone else in this field except for Peter Johnson and glad I made the choice of Johnson and Johnson!

Peter johnson helped me out alot. I was faceing a dui and possesion charge. He won the dui hearing and got the case dissmissed in regular court. He was worth every penny. Very professional. Thank you peter. Please consider him if u need a deffense lawyer.
The kindest smartest honest attorney in bay by far

I was emailing Jesse, sent him all my court information and he never got back to me. Called the office and they told me they would give my case to Carin, who I also sent everything to and all she did was ask for my phone number, which I sent and I never received a call or email or anything. Just a big waste of time. I was really trying to retain them since I read good reviews. I just had a bad experience with communication with them.

I was pulled over by CHP back in 2017 after cutting off a driver who had been going too slow in the left lane. The officer asked me if I had consumed any drinks that evening, and I answered truthfully -- yes, but I had stopped 4 hours ago. The "yes" was only the answer he was looking for, and I was forced out of my car for field sobriety testing. The officer administered the tests multiple times until he was satisfied that he had a result he could exploit, then placed me into the back of his patrol vehicle and hauled me off to county jail.

When I was released the next day, I asked my attorney friends for recommendations for a good DUI attorney. When I explained the nuances of my arrest and the ramifications of a potential DUI conviction on my career to the recommended attorneys, several of them referred me to the person they said they would want to represent themselves: Peter Johnson. It is not an exaggeration to say that Peter has written the book on DUI defense, because he has, literally; search for "California Driving Under the Influence Defense" by Taylor and Johnson, and you'll find the 2020-2021 edition, published by Thomson Reuters.

I scheduled an appointment and met with Peter a day or two later. We got straight to the facts while they were still fresh, both of us writing down everything, and then explained to me his strategy: trust nothing about the "facts" provided by the officer, but question and verify everything. He then got to work, and oh man, did he do a good job. The field test results were thrown out by the judge because they were found to be improperly obtained. The blood tests were also suspect, as the DA's office had their lab test them five (!!) times, with varying results each time. Their own lab director refused to testify to the veracity of the results, which is just mind boggling. Peter said that he would fight for me, and fight he did: my case was recently settled to my satisfaction.

I hope that you do not need his services, but if you do, give him a call. You will not regret it.

Highly recommend attorney Jesse Gill who judiciously yet thoughtfully spent time and effort with my niece to understand and address a complicated guardian case/issue. He was highly recommended to us by a very experienced well regarded attorney, Mr.Stone, and delivered as expected. We are most appreciative.

With my experience: Peter Johnson was/is a very profession, straightforward and knowledgeable attorney and knows the laws both federal and state and your best interest at heart, giving you all the options that best suit my case. And Jen his associate was so helpful. She always kept me updated on all court dates, appearances. And answered all my question in a very efficient manner. After talking to her and Peter, before the phone call ended you knew everything would workout and everything would be fine. Thank you so much for all you have done and your still doing. If your looking for a great attorney give Peter a call...differently a 5 star representation.

One sunny afternoon after tennis at McNeers, I was headed home down Lucas Valley Road, and missed the turn south onto Hwy 101. Not a big deal, I pulled onto the shoulder of the road to make a U-turn. I was driving a MB AMG GTS which is about 3" off of the ground on a good day. This particular shoulder has  high grass (weeds) and hid the 2" dip which no one cares about UNLESS you are driving a car with virtually no clearance. My front wheels caught wrecking the entire front fender. I waited for help for >30" but NO one came by. I took a deep breath and floored the car in reverse knowing I was causing serious damage to the rest of the car. Suffice it to say, I managed to get the car back onto LVR headed east toward Hwy 101 to go home. BUT the car stopped. It just stopped right in the lane, a built-in MB safety factor when the car senses severe damage. I was able to get to the shoulder before it stopped rolling.

I was relieved when a Sheriff Deputy pulled up behind me.  However, that was a short-lived relief b/c she said she would call in the CHP and that is when my horrific day began to get worse. It was not enough that I had done $80,000 damage to my brand new car but this audaciously angry officer approached my window screaming ":YOU ARE DRIVING AND DRINKING."

"I don't drink," I said quietly hoping to calm him down,  to which he responded, "Then you are on drugs" and he took me to jail. I was released after 4 hours, driven home, stunned and with no car.

I waited for two years for the DA to issue her indictment. The first attorney I had did nothing for one year. The 2nd attorney told me repeatedly how good he was and how well he knew the DA. A number of months went by and nothing happened; as it turned out, NO one had ever heard anything good about him.

Then my personal attorney introduced me to Peter Johnson and the case was dismissed within six months.

If  you are ever receive a DUI, justly or otherwise, or you need criminal defense or have a civil rights claim, you need to call Peter Johnson and it will be the only phone call  you need to make.  Johnson & Johnson Law Offices, Peter Johnson, Partner, 2125 Oak Grove Road, Ste 315, Walnut Creek, CA 94598
Or you can email me if you have any questions: Lisa Moody, moodylisa0@aol.com

Diana is incredibly responsive, compassionate, and truly committed to achieving the best possible outcome for her clients. Diana is honest, down-to-earth, and excellent at setting realistic expectations—she tells you exactly how it is. It’s refreshing to work with an attorney who prioritizes her client’s well-being over her own bottom line.

If you’re dealing with a workers’ compensation claim, I highly recommend calling Diana. She made an incredibly difficult situation much easier to navigate.

Diana from Elite Comp Law firm assisted me with my workers comp case. She was extremely helpful, detail oriented, stayed on top of the case and provided me with regular updates, and was a true professional. Her compassion towards her clients and her deep understanding of workers comp law makes her a great attorney. My overall experience was fantastic. I highly recommend her for any workers comp case assistance.
If you're looking for a worker's comp attorney, I highly recommend Elite Comp Law, PC!  In my opinion, they take all claims very seriously and truly will do their best to fight for your case.

When I began my workers’ compensation journey, I reached out to five different attorneys. Every single one of them told me the same thing: “Just go back to work and do what they say.” It felt like no one believed in my case, and honestly, I was starting to lose hope. Then Diana called.

She was the last person to reach out, and by that point, I was ready to give up. I told her right away, “I don’t want to waste your time.” But she gently insisted—“Tell me what’s going on.” And that one moment changed everything.

As soon as I explained my situation, Diana saw what no one else did. She told me we had a case, and from that moment forward, she went to work for me. She got me a new doctor, real help, and became a powerful advocate during a time when I didn’t even know I had the right to be fought for. I had no idea a lawyer could be so hands-on and committed throughout the entire process.

Diana broke everything down clearly, thoroughly, and patiently. She always answered my calls, responded to emails, and made sure I never felt in the dark. Her communication was flawless, and her dedication never wavered.

What started out as a search for a new doctor ended with a substantial settlement—something I never expected. And when we thought we had reached the final amount, Diana pushed even further and got us more. That kind of tenacity and care is rare.

I would recommend Diana without hesitation to anyone navigating the workers’ comp system. She is honest, compassionate, and absolutely brilliant at what she does. Truly the best in her field.
Diana helped me resolve my issues quickly and efficiently. I could not have hoped for a better result. Thank you!

Diana Tarnopolskaya is the Gold Standard of Workers Comp Law! I hired her when she first started her Elite Comp Law Firm and it was the best decision I ever made!!! I rarely give reviews. And particularly only when they were well deserved, hence the five star rating.  The tandem of Kosta and Michael of the Demiris Law Firm worked beautifully together like a symphony of heavy metal music on a recent case we entrusted them with. The case was very emotional for us, as it was related to family members that we cared a great deal about.  These two took the time to understand our concerns about what was being done on the other end and fought tooth and nail for us along the way towards what was a reasonable settlement on our behalf. If you are looking for silver tongued, meek, smooth talking attorneys in $3000 designer suits who will tell you what you wanna hear...these are not the guys for you!
They will be brutally honest. They will tell you the positives and negatives about your case, talk openly about potential success, be straightforward and genuinely concerned with your particular situation.  Most importantly, they will work on your behalf like a hungry pit bull does on a t-bone steak to get you what you deserve.  Give them a call!

Highly recommend Kosta and his team. He was recommended by a friend and another lawyer. From first contact I felt more at ease knowing he would be on my side. Kosta explained all my options and was not pushy about which one I ultimately decided would be best for me. I opted for possible mediation that could lead to a court case. To my huge relief Kosta’s savvy arguments and determination was able to help me get my fair share of the trust. Kosta responded very quickly to my emails and calls. He was always patient with me. I’m very happy with the outcome.

My brother hired Kosta Demiris. Sadly two days into trial he bailed after my brother took out 2 or 3 loans on his house, his girlfriend took an advance in alimony pmts and took from her Ira and it still wasn't enough. He was hounded for more money seemed like daily.

My sister if u can call her that, more like the devil, got to keep everything she had stolen, ruined relationships, responsible for infecting my mother with covid, abandoning my father after electronically transferring money she should not have done and after purchasing a 970k condo she abandoned him and flew back to New York to enjoy her rewards she worked diligently to get.

I dont think he did enough in the beginning to stop her from being able to use trust funds for her defence and to burificate the case was a huge loss.

To get to a point where u can finally get justice at ur fingertips to have it all thrown away is mind blowing.

Kosta kept telling him u need this much more money and some how he would find it only to be told its 10k a day for trial and then if u win this part then u need to prove undue influence and it would be god only knows how much more.

In the end my brother got squashed and so did I. I told my brother to get rid of the arraogant jerk but he didnt listen.

They accomplished absolutly nothing. My brother is selling his house on 41 acres and has bought a fifth wheel to live in.

Way to go!
