Konstantine Demiris has been my litigator for a family trust dispute.  It was one of the most auspicious days of my life when he agreed to defend me.  The dispute involved contentious family members, an aging mother who died before the dispute was resolved, and a plethora of complicated conservator and trust issues.

Kosta is well-educated; he attended the University of California at Berkeley and the University of Santa Clara Law School.  He is a consummate professional and has in depth knowledge of probate law and the workings of the courtroom.  Kosta is always prepared to do research in the event of mind boggling issues for their legal resolutions.

Kosta is personable and compassionate. He kept me informed of my ongoing case events without adding to my anxiety.  We exchanged emails frequently and had phone conferences as needed.  He has a wonderful sense of humor and that helped me survive this ordeal.  The litigation involved an entanglement of assorted attorneys and petitions which Kosta unraveled with acumen.
He was my North Star in troubled waters.

Kosta is reasonable and fair with his fees.  He deserves every penny.

I highly recommend Konstantine Demiris for anyone’s defense in any probate court action.

Mr. Demiris controlled demeanor, confidence, and his wealth of legal knowledge regarding our case is to be commended. His strategy with our case was spot on and there is no doubt the very positive outcome we received would not have been possible without the formidable talents of Mr. Kostas Demiris.

I rarely spend the time to write reviews but I just had to for Vrej, the attorney, because he is highly recommended and wonderful. Vrej helped my 70+ old mom get out of a $20,000+ water softener company contract that was predatory and ultimately not compliant with California law. From the start, Vrej was highly professional, thorough, and took the time to explain everything clearly so we understood the process and options. Although the water softener company repeatedly delayed and dragged out the process, Vrej was persistent and followed up consistently for several months until we finally received written confirmation that the contract was fully canceled. His expertise made a stressful situation manageable and the outcome lifted a significant financial burden off of my mom. We are very, very grateful for Vrej's knowledge, care, dedication, and we highly recommend you turn to Vrej for legal help.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to share this detailed review. We’re so glad Vrej was able to help your mom cancel the predatory contract and relieve that financial burden. We appreciate your recognition of his professionalism, persistence, and clear communication. Your recommendation means a lot to our team. If you need any further assistance, we remain available to help.

reviews.text:
We contacted Vreg following an eviction notice from a landlord attempting to force us out of our office mid lease. After failed attempts to collect operating expenses that were clearly not applicable in our Lease agreement and false claims regarding insurance certificate requirements, they attempted to bully us into leaving.
They wanted the property back after purchasing from a family member in hopes of raising the rent.  We offered them an opportunity for us to leave if they covered our moving expenses and our Tenant Improvements.   Not only did they fail to take us up on our generous offer, they attempted to use the legal system to force us out instead.
We contacted Vrej immediately after utilizing his services in the past on another case, where he resolved the issue quickly and effectively.
On the current case, Vrej was very strategic in his plan and executed our objective effectively.  Not only did he beat them in court, he arranged a settlement which was identical to our original offer.  He recovered all of our Attorney fees and took care of all of the details including Court Documents, Court appearances and negotiations with the opposing Attorney.  His calm and confident approach allowed us to do what we are supposed to be doing, running our business and helping kids and Families.  I highly recommend Vrej and his team.  They are a top notch partner when we need them most!

When I contacted various law firms, it turned out that almost all of them protect the interests of tenants. And some lawyers said that we would definitely lose the case, since due to the lack of experience when filing a claim, we made a few of inaccuracies. And he not only gave us hope, but also achieved a court decision in our favor. We were proud of him, because he defended us with a sense of professional dignity, culture and superiority of his knowledge. I recommend Mr. Vrej to everyone as an excellent lawyer and a wonderful person!

I wholeheartedly recommend Michael for anyone needing a skilled and effective attorney. He took on my case after my previous representation left me in a precarious position—a risk many in his field avoid—and I will be forever grateful he did. From our first consultation, his competence was obvious; he immediately asked the incisive questions my previous representation had missed. My confidence in having a strong advocate returned immediately upon retaining him.

Despite starting at a disadvantage and facing sanctions due to prior delays, Michael completely turned the situation around. He has a great sense of when to be patient and when to be assertive, and he consistently found ways past every impasse we encountered.

Beyond his legal strategy, Michael was exceptionally responsive and provided vital support throughout the entire process. He is remarkably efficient, his billing was fair and cost-effective, and I believe his work saved me significantly more than I paid in fees. Michael is a true professional who gets results—I am very happy with the outcome of my case and truly enjoyed working with him.

Michael was outstanding to work with. He’s knowledgeable, responsive, and exceptionally thorough. He explained everything clearly, made sure I understood my options, and guided me through all important decisions. The process felt organized and efficient, and I had real confidence that the details were handled correctly. If you’re looking for an attorney who is professional, patient, and genuinely on top of things, I highly recommend Michael Geller.

At first, I was thinking I don’t need a lawyer for my divorce but then things got really nasty and I definitely was in need of one. With so many options it was hard to choose one but after my first meeting with Michael I knew I made the right choice. He immediately gives you the feeling that he takes care of you and I got that confirmed in the 17 months it actually took for my case. Michael doesn’t know what is 9 till 5. He is there for you 24/7 if needed. Yes, he has a higher price tag but at the end it comes down to the saying: “You get what you paid for”. And well, have I seen some incompetent lawyers on the opposite site.
To sum it up he knows what he is doing, he does it with enthusiasm and most important he delivers. But what for me had also been an amazing experience is that he becomes more than your lawyer, he becomes kind of a friend, someone who is there for you when needed.
So, would I recommend him? Without any doubt. You want to make sure to get the job done? Don’t look at the cost, keep the results in mind and as he told me several times: Peace has its price.

I strongly urge anyone considering legal representation to conduct thorough research before hiring this attorney. I specifically advise against hiring Mr. Daniel. Over the course of my criminal and family law case, he charged me an astonishing $100,000 and failed to appear at a single court date in the criminal court. His absence during these critical proceedings was not only alarming but detrimental to my case.

I was embroiled in a situation involving false allegations, and Mr. Daniel assured me that he would triumphantly win my criminal case, promising that all charges would ultimately be dismissed. Unfortunately, his assurances proved hollow. This entire law firm operates in a way that feels fraudulent, and I am not alone in my concerns—Mr. Daniel has been reported to the state bar on several occasions.

For those interested in confirming his standing, I recommend looking him up on the California State Bar website, where you can find relevant information that may highlight why he should be avoided. My experience has been nothing short of a financial and emotional burden, as he capitalized on my trust and left me without the support I desperately needed.

It is important to note that, while my criminal case was eventually dismissed, I had to seek assistance from an entirely different law firm. Mr. Darrell Griffin took over my case and truly advocated for me, leading to the successful dismissal of all charges. Please take my experiences as a warning to protect yourself and your future when selecting legal representation.

Ken represented me for my case 2 years ago. I wasn’t completely satisfied with my results based on talking to others who went through the same thing and got much better results. But I was happy it was over and it could have been much worse. But it was a bumpy road. He made me contact the DMV myself multiple times even after they told me they cannot speak to me if I have representation. Come the day of my court date, he told me to meet him at one courthouse and he arrived late and then it turned out it was the wrong courthouse. Made me run across the street to the other courthouse and that one wasn’t right either and said we needed to go back to the original courthouse. Again, not right. Turns out we needed to be at a courthouse in a whole different city. Arrived incredibly late.

Wrapped up at court and I felt pretty confused about what I was supposed to do next. I felt very rushed by ken and not informed about anything at all.

Despite all of this, over a month ago I sought his help again with another case, related to the first. He answered my call and said we would take care of it and told me to call him the following day at noon to discuss. I called, he didn’t answer. I sent a text asking him to just call me when he could. He read it, no reply. I texted again the following day. Read, no reply. Texted again earlier this week. Read, no reply. At this point it had been over a month so I sought other counsel. I met with another attorney yesterday and then today that attorney called me to tell me he got my case completely dismissed.

Had I waited longer for ken to get back to me, I’d be in a very different position than I am now.

I feel compelled to warn everyone to steer clear of Ken Moyal! This so-called attorney charged us $13,000, and here’s what he actually accomplished:

1. We first met him in 2024, where he requested $6,000 upfront.

2. He attended the initial hearing, which lasted barely two hours. The petitioner asked the judge for an immediate decision, and the outcome was a split ruling—50/50 custody—because both parents needed to be involved. That two hours cost us 6k! Let’s pretend travel was 2 additional hours: 4 total hours cost us = $6,000!

3. He then requested an additional $7,000. He was present for the contempt hearing over ZOOM, but since the respondent hadn't been served, the case should have been dismissed. Ken failed to mention this to the judge. We ended up reaching a quick agreement, and the hearing lasted just 30 minutes.

4. Ken canceled our next hearing, claiming he had COVID, and reacted unprofessionally by yelling and cussing at the respondent over the phone and hanging up on him like a child. (there is a security camera with this recording)

5. He appeared in court over zoom for only 30 minutes to tell the judge he was unwell and to reschedule the hearing for August 18th, 2025.

6. Just two days before the rescheduled hearing, he called us to say our retainer had run out! The 7k! WTH

Is he serious? This is unacceptable behavior for a legal professional! 13k?

Ken Moyal - You asked for an honest review. Here it is!! Shame on you!!

A letter of appreciation to John and his Team,

I was in a bad car accident; I was rear-ended so hard it took two tow trucks to pull the vehicles apart. I was referred to John Fetto by my healthcare Professional. I was worried if I could even get compensation because I had a long history of neck and back problems. I ended up needing physical therapy, multiple Epidural Steroid Injections in my neck, and finally surgery to fuse 3 vertebrae. After going through the deposition and medical examination requested by the other side, the opposing insurance company did not want to pay anything because of my prior history. John would have none of that and he began to prepare for court. He assembled an amazing teem to fight on my behalf. Kenia collected and assembled years of my medical history. Russell produced documents, coordinated zoom meetings, and created an amazing visual presentation to present in court. John, knowing I was willing to go to court, called in Sandy Cipinko, an excellent trial attorney. The two of them worked flawlessly together each handling different aspects of the case. John is a true professional. John, Sandy, and their amazing team took me from the possibility of getting nothing, to a settlement I never dreamed possible. This shows you that, even with an extensive medical history, you can still come out a winner with John and his team.

I will always be grateful to them.

Sincerely,
Rose

We sincerely regret that your experience with our firm did not meet your expectations. Our goal is always to provide compassionate, effective representation, and we take feedback seriously as it helps us improve our services.

Our decision to withdraw from your case was made after careful consideration and was based on professional judgment. We strive to maintain a respectful and professional environment for all our clients and staff. While we understand that emotions can run high in legal matters, we don't tolerate the use of vulgar language during our communications, as it affects our ability to work collaboratively toward a resolution. Additionally, we have documentation that the financial amounts referenced in your review are not accurate, and in fact there was an outstanding balance on your account, which we kindly decided to void.

We are proud of the work we did during our representation, including successfully assisting you with navigating child custody along with other complex legal challenges during a particularly difficult time. We are also glad to hear that your custody matter has progressed, though we understand that this progress was achieved with the assistance of new legal counsel, as these matters often require professional expertise.

We wish you and your family the best moving forward and we will remain committed to serving our clients with integrity and dedication.

I had a fantastic experience working with my auto accident lawyer. She was incredibly responsive, always available to answer my questions and provide updates on my case. reviews.text: Dawn is the best! I reached out to her the second time since years ago for another matter. Dawn was promptly instructed me how to proceed and send me all the resources since I might be able to handle it on my own without paying lots of $$$. She is my #1 go to lawyer, highly recommended to everyone!

Dawn is an amazing lawyer. She's organized, ethical, sharp as as knife , and knows the laws backward and forward from both sides of personal injury lawsuits. She was, from the first day when I contacted her, a downright pleasure to work with. She always got back to me via email, usually within 15 minutes (seriously!). She kept me updated on everything that was happening with a lengthy lawsuit. She made sure I understood everything that was going on, everything I was signing, and how the whole process worked. She held my hand through two years of legal processes around a tediously medical issue resulting from a car crash.

I had a sticky case: I'd been rear-ended and gotten some sort of soft tissue damage that put me out of commission for the better part of a year and a half. All sorts of diagnostics failed to show exactly what was wrong, and treatments failed to make it better in any hurry. There was just a lot of pain whenever I used my right arm. (In retrospect, probably a rotator cuff injury that we didn't catch until a year after the accident, when it was mostly healed). I was sick at the thought of talking to the insurance company; there's no way to prove that you're in pain. Dawn took my case despite the uncertainty around it, and she got me an absolutely fair settlement despite all the medical muddling.

In addition to being terrifyingly competent, Dawn was unfailingly kind. When we had to do a deposition, and I was scared of being interrogated, she made sure I knew exactly how it worked, knew what I had to do, and then spent a good 15 minutes afterward debriefing and checking in on how I was. Then she sent a follow up email telling me that I'd done a great job. She kept me in mind as a person as well as a client. She was so professional, so sure of every step, and so obviously on top of everything that I was able to let her handle the case and go about my life without worrying about it too much. I am grateful for her services, and I'd recommend her highly for any legal help you might need.
Was a grate lawyer

reviews.text: A former employer appealed my unemployment and I was so scared I would lose to him in court. I contacted over 20 different lawyers to help me with my appeal hearing and all refused to help me except Mr. Barnum. Mr. Barnum met with me outside his business hours on a short notice and educated me about my rights and helped me put together cross examination questions that would help my case. During the hearing I felt very confident and in control all thanks to Mr. Barnum. I would highly recommend him!

Words cannot express how tremendously grateful I am to Randy Barnum and Jenna Avila for their sincere compassion and legal assistance during one of the most challenging times in my life.

While coming highly recommended to me by my in-laws, Law Offices of Barnum & Avila level of expertise and professionalism surpassed even my greatest expectations. Aside from their obvious skill and remarkable success rate, they are genuinely committed to their clients. They were honest, transparent & compassionate to my situation.

Regardless of the time or the importance of my matter, every phone call and email was promptly and personally returned. With each circumstance that arose, they gave practical advice and supplied the necessary information to allow me to make my own informed decisions. They guided me through the long and daunting legal process, yet never lost their patience despite my frequent and overwhelming inquiries. They went above and beyond to make sure we received a fair settlement. We would recommend and use them in the future.

Simply put, lawyers like Mr. Barnum and Mrs. Avila are truly and exceptionally rare. They are professional, efficient, and Personable. Though it goes without saying, I would never hesitate to use or refer their firms outstanding services in the future. Thank you both!

reviews.text: I'm not giving her any stars because, honestly, I hired her to handle my immigration case, and all she did was process my work permit, and that was it. I paid her $8,500, which was completely wasted. Honestly, you can't trust lawyers, so I don't recommend them at all. 👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to leave a comment. However, it is important to clarify a few points to provide a more accurate picture of your case and our professional relationship.

Our team worked diligently to prepare and present your complete case, ensuring that all legal requirements were met and that it was filed on time. As you know, the process was delayed for several years due to circumstances beyond our control, which is common in immigration cases.

During that time, we maintained clear communication regarding our fee policies, which reflect the ongoing effort and resources dedicated to your case. Despite our multiple requests to settle your outstanding balance, we regret that you chose not to fulfill your financial obligations to our office.

Our goal has always been to provide high-quality, professional service to our clients, but we must also ensure that the work and dedication of our team are respected.

We wish you success in the future and remain committed to the values ​​of transparency and fairness that characterize our firm.

Sincerely,

Johanna's Team

reviews.text:
Burnham Brown represents NorCal Realty Group, my landlord, and their conduct regarding my claims and concerns against them has been negligent and dismissive. From 2023 to the present, I've sent repeated emails outlining serious and ongoing issues--including secondhand smoke exposure affecting a minor, ADA accommodation requests, chronic health conditions, and tenant harassment. Multiple communications have gone unanswered or unacknowledged by attorney Charles Alfonzo, despite documented evidence attached in each message.

In addition, I mailed certified legal documents to their 1901 Harrison St, Oakland address--still listed across Google, and multiple legal directories. I was only told after the fact that this address is no longer valid. This lack of consistency in their public-facing business information led to avoidable delays and financial loss. Charles Alfonzo was FULLY aware I was mailing documents to him and felt no need to confirm address to ensure receipt of the documents.

Their Better Business Bureau profile confirms they are NOT an accredited business, which aligns with the lack of accountability I've experienced.

Ironically, Yelp appears to be the only platform that reflects their current Walnut Creek address.

When a law firm tasked with landlord representation ignores health, housing, and civil rights concerns, the harm isn't just procedural--it's personal. This review is here because the silence from their end has spoken volumes.

Please see Google search screenshots for validation. BBB screenshot included as well.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Kurt!

reviews.text:
I don't really write yelp reviews. But I have to get it out here to warn others.
I had an unbelievable unprofessional experience with Burnham Brown. I contracted with them for a tenant issue back in May. The tenant asked for $8k in water damage. I had a meeting with one of their partners. He quoted me $3.5k for the case. And told me that they have over 50% chance to win the case. I agreed on their term and put down a $3.5 deposit. The quote was reasonable 3.5k/50% is lower than 8K. And they confirmed with me that anything over it will get my authorization before moving forward.
They assigned a junior lawyer to my case who I contact from day today.
The quality of work was poor. I received a couple of letters that required my signature was copied over another case without even change to my names and addresses. I can read their other client's names and addresses. I have to send emails and calls back to help to correct their mistakes. No surprise that they also charged me extra time that they have to rework the letter as part of "extra work". It happened three times with different documents. I can't believe how much effort someone put into an important legal document while forgot changing their client's name and address. I kept finding low-level mistakes. I once received three revisions in a day.  Of course, no surprise, the assigned lawyer went to the hearing without preparing the case well. She didn't even know nor argued that a temporary and permanent relocation fee during a sewer back up situation can not be issued at the same time. Unbelievable, it is from your lawyer who you should depend on to advise you.  Without preparation or knowledge, the case blew up from what they asked $8k to 22k settlement. at the same time, Burnham Brown sent me a bill of about 30k. They told me that they did "extra work" in my case. Unfortunately, they never informed me of their "extra" work beyond $3.5k their originally quote. Since I have never received anything oral or in writing about "extra" work for my authorization, they wanted to give me a discount and asked me to pay 18K instead of blown up 30K bill.
Seriously, no one in their right mind would ever agree to even move forward with $30k of a legal fee to $8k case settlement with a 50% chance of winning. I told them that I am not happy with their service and result.
Burnham Brown then quoted me $8k to repeal the decision. Then I wrote a letter to the about repeal.  Without even a hearing date of repeal set up, they sent me another bill for over $6.3k.
I couldn't stomach them anymore with their poor performance and aggressive unethical billing. I told them to stop working on anything over my case and get another lawyer to work on it.
I wrote an email to ask about, what on earth, they can bill me 80% ($6300/$8000) of their "work" without getting even the hearing date set. Then I got an email back, without any explanation on the 80% bill of a case they barely even started, only with a threat, quote:" Please be advised that we will seek judicial arbitration of fees and request attorneys fees for the time spent on collection per the fee agreement."
Of course, I should have expected it. Burnham Brown just found another excuse to charge more.
I will keep everyone updated on this matter. Overall, it is crazy how a lawyer can be unprofessional, abuse their power and try to make money out of you by making a mess instead of helping you. I hope to help others to avoid being their next victim.

Mr. Kuyawa knowingly submitted fraudulent documents as trial exhibits and continued to prosecute the matter after becoming aware that the evidence was false. Despite being informed—or otherwise having clear reason to know—that the materials were inaccurate or intentionally falsified, he took no steps to correct the record, withdraw the exhibit, or notify the court, as required by the California Rules of Professional Conduct.

This conduct constitutes:

Violation of Rule 3.3 – Candor toward the tribunal
Violation of Rule 3.1 – Meritorious claims and contentions
Violation of Rule 8.4(c) – Engaging in conduct involving dishonesty, fraud, deceit, or misrepresentation
reviews.ownerResponse:
This individual was never a client of my firm and never had an attorney–client relationship with me. He was an opposing party in active litigation.

The allegations made in this review are false. Any issues relating to evidence or trial conduct were addressed through the court process, where judges—not anonymous online reviewers—determine credibility, admissibility, and compliance with professional obligations. At no time did I submit fraudulent materials or violate the California Rules of Professional Conduct.

Prospective clients should understand that it is not uncommon for opposing parties in contested litigation to post retaliatory reviews when they are dissatisfied with the outcome of a case. Such reviews do not reflect the quality, ethics, or professionalism of representation provided to clients.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. I want to clarify for future readers that my practice has since evolved and is now focused on representing tenants in habitability cases, for which consultations are provided at no cost.

At the time of this inquiry, my practice included other areas of law that required paid consultations due to the time and analysis involved. Consultation policies vary by practice area, and fee-based consultations are common in many types of legal matters.

Today, tenants who are dealing with unsafe or uninhabitable living conditions are encouraged to contact my office for a free consultation so we can evaluate whether we can help.

PART 2
I definitely was not expecting a free clinic I was expecting an ethical business practices. It's your right to charge your clients as much as you desire. However I seen nothing explaining your selective billing process in your ad. But in my opinion to pay $350 for any attorney to tell me there's no evictions being processed at this time during pandemic, fall in the same category of companies overcharging for hand sanitizer and face mask. I've done many evictions from San Jose to Sacramento and back to East Oakland and 10 hours minimum is quite excessive. But if your clients are happy that's what's important to you. However this was just my experience.
Thank you and have a great day.
reviews.ownerResponse:
This is not a free legal clinic. If you want free legal advice please use the legal clinics that are out there. If you are unwilling to pay a consultation fee (which is credited towards the attorney fee later if you decide to hire me) then it tells me you have no interest in hiring an attorney. I provide free legal consultations on personal injury cases only. The reason my clients are happy is because I do not waste time on people who just want free legal advice and have no interest in hiring a real attorney. This allows me to work on the cases where clients have actually retained me and want their problems solved.

PART 2 RESPONSE- this is an example of someone who refuses to pay for legal services and expects them to be free. If he does not receive it from you then he will post a 1 star yelp review on your page in retaliation and act like he just had a bad experience. I never spoke with this individual. The consultation essentially does become a free consult if you decide to hire me because I credit that $350 towards the attorney fee. The $350 is a barrier for people like this that simply want to waste your time and have no intention of hiring an attorney. This individual refused to pay, got upset, and now posted this 1 star review.

There are many things you can do during this pandemic to get a tenant out. Of course if you are talking to some dollar tree attorney who is offering a free consultation I doubt he will know or care about other avenues that you can use to get the tenant out. With the amount of extra rules imposed by the city, county, the state, the federal level, and the difficulties of evicting during this pandemic it is completely reasonable to ask for a 10 hour retainer. This is not like the old days where evictions are simple.

What could have resulted in a DUI conviction and license suspension was resolved in the most favorable way possible.

The charges were reduced to a wet reckless with no jail time and significantly reduced penalties. Only a 12-hour class and a reduced court fee were required.

Even more importantly, although the District Attorney did not agree to it, Attorney Fleming successfully persuaded the Court to enter a not guilty finding on the .08% BAC count. That finding required the DMV to set aside the suspension entirely. The driving privilege was fully preserved.

From the beginning, Attorney Fleming approached the case with confidence, clarity, and a well-defined strategy. This outcome was not luck. It was the result of preparation, experience, and strong advocacy.

He understands both the courtroom and the DMV process and knows how to navigate each effectively. Communication was clear and timely, and every step of the case was handled with professionalism and precision.

The result protected employment, family stability, and future opportunities.

I am truly grateful for what Attorney Fleming accomplished. Follow his recommendations and pray that he can do the same for you!

I was arrested for a DUI after swerving on the freeway. My breath test showed a 0.103 BAC
I was very fortunate to have Thomas M. Fleming as my attorney.
Thomas went to trial with DMV, and DMV found me not guilty so I wouldn’t lose my license.
He then spoke privately with the prosecutor and judge a number of times about my case. Finally, he got them to agree to dismiss the entire DUI case in exchange for just a speeding ticket with traffic school and 10 hours of voluntary work at any charity! This is really a miracle of miracles!
He is the best in the profession and knows all the little details that will give you the winning edge and help you avoid any hurdles in the process. He can work miracles as he did in my case and got the charges dismissed. From the very first day, he supported, guided and helped me go through this tough time in my life. He is very resourceful, has elite skills as a lawyer and also guided me with improving myself through the case timeline to get the best suited outcome.
I am very thankful for his services and cannot emphasize enough to have him as your lawyer if you want the best for yourself!

Exceptional DUI Attorney – Truly Dedicated and Compassionate

I was charged with a DUI in February, and as someone living in the U.S. on a visa, I was extremely stressed and uncertain about my future. After searching online, I came across Mr. Thomas Fleming, and from our very first conversation, I knew I was in good hands. His professionalism, calm demeanor, and clear communication immediately put me at ease.

Mr. Thomas took the time to explain every part of the process, making sure I understood my rights and what to expect. He encouraged me to trust his guidance and reassured me throughout one of the most difficult times in my life. What stood out most was his compassion — he even worked with me on a manageable payment plan.

By the time my court date arrived, I had completed everything he recommended. Thanks to his experience, strong reputation, and excellent relationships within the court system, he achieved an incredible outcome — a Helmandollar plea, which is one of the best possible results in a DUI case. This is a court verdict of not guilty of the DUI charges, with a court order that the DMV also find me not guilty of the DUI and not suspend my license!

Mr. Thomas not only helped me legally but also helped me mentally and spiritually to deal with this stress.
I even invited him to my wedding — that’s how much he meant to me through this difficult time.

Mr. Thomas is the best lawyer I’ve ever met, and I’ll recommend him to anyone that will listen.

I was arrested for a DUI and case went to court. Thomas got my court case dismissed by the judge. He also got the dmv hearing officer to dismiss my dmv case.

I consider both dismissal to be miracles!

Thomas ALWAYS responded fast. He was very helpful and hands on but as well made sure I understood everything going on through the process.

Would definitely rate a 10/10 experience and highly recommend! He was able to get me a full dismissal in my court and dmv case. So glad I choose him to represent me.

I highly recommend Thomas Fleming as an accomplished attorney in every respect. Mr. Fleming achieved the unachievable by defending my daughter during a DUI proceeding. His expertise as well as his EQ (emotional quotient) combined to enable a favorable outcome as well as a teaching moment for my daughter. He got the DUI charges dismissed. We went to trial at a DMV hearing. He hired an expert forensic toxicologist. Based on the experts testimony, DMV found my daughter not guilty and did not suspend my daughter’s license.
If you are seeking a highly experienced attorney in a DUI case you will not be disappointed when partnering with him.

Mr. Fleming was a Godsend during a very difficult period in my life.

Last year, I made a grave mistake by driving after drinking, and I was arrested with a BAC of .16. Feeling hopeless. I began seeking legal counsel and ultimately consulted Mr. Fleming.
He reassured me that everything would be okay and encouraged me to have faith. Mr. Fleming genuinely cares about his clients and helped me grow and elevate myself as a person.

Regarding the case, the District Attorney filed it a little late and did not notify us. Mr. Fleming jumped on the technicality and immediately filed a motion to dismiss. He argued it to the court, and the court agreed and dismissed my case!

He consistently kept me informed about every proceeding and was willing to go the extra mile to explain the details. As an immigrant pursuing permanent residence in the United States, it was especially important for the case to be dismissed, and he achieved exactly that. He won me a dismissal!
Given the high BAC level, this outcome is all the more remarkable.
I would highly recommend Mr. Fleming to anyone in need of DUI representation. Not only will you receive the highest level of professional service, but you will also be guided toward personal growth and self-improvement. Thank you, Mr. Fleming, for everything you have done. I will be forever grateful.

I was at a very low point in my life. Long story short I got a DUI with a .13 bac when caught traveling at an extremely high rate of speed.

I retained Thomas and he helped me in a miraculously way. He was able to discuss and negotiate my case with the judge and DA. He got them to dismiss my DUI charges. In exchange, i only have to do 16 hours of volunteer work at any charity or church with a wet reckless that can be expunged from my record in 1 year. Definitely no jail time!

Thomas is an amazing attorney, he was always honest and straight forward with me and he seems give all his efforts to help his clients. He had great communication with me and was always willing to take time to explain each step of the court proceedings.

He gave me recommendations for classes and activities to help me in my situation. With that, i was able to find myself again and get back onto the right path in life.

I dont know what i would've done without Thomas!!
he's the best!

After being arrested for a .20 BAC DUI involving an accident, I thought my life was over. Fear. Panic. Guilt.

I sought Thomas Fleming based on his many positive reviews and upon our first conversation he was attentive to the details, extremely knowledgeable about the process, but most importantly, he offered a calm, forgiving, and uplifting countenance. He seemed to not only care about the details of my case, but also about my wellbeing.

As my case progressed, Thomas offered peaceful council and professional direction. He directed me toward activities to begin righting my path, both personally and legally. Instead of waiting for the system to retroactively appoint tasks as punishment, I was encouraged to pursue those tasks early in the process.

Mr. Fleming relentlessly defended my case, which was miraculously pled down to a Wet and Reckless. I was also relieved to have already finished many of the requirements to complete my probation. I stayed with Thomas through the restitution process and ultimately through successful expungement.

The emotional, physical and financial costs of a DUI are a heavy burden to carry, but I am thankful to have found Thomas Fleming to lead me through the legal system, guide me with personal care and deliver positive results through a most difficult experience.

I strongly recommend his professional services.

I found Thomas in a moment in my life when I felt like things were going downhill for me. I got arrested for my second-time DUI, the first which I got just two years before.

I realized I had one more day to find an attorney so I did some research on the internet and felt like my time was running out. I came across Thomas on Yelp and called his offices. He answered and we spoke on the phone for a little bit and he decided to represent me which felt like a huge relief. He treated me like a friend and reassured me that everything would be okay if I pray and get my life together, which I did, and then he would do the rest.

He attended court for me, and he was able to bring down the second-time DUI to only a wet reckless driving charge!

That saved me a whole lot of trouble and money and I didn’t have to serve any time in jail, do any volunteer work, or have any punishment. It really did save me from disaster and now I have completely stopped drinking and driving which has made my life better in a lot of ways. Thomas was there for me and pulled off what seems like a miracle for a second DUI.

I am so thankful for him. He is truly the best, very honest and faithful, and a great attorney. If you’re in the Bay area and need to be represented for a DUI, Thomas is your guy.

I was arrested for DUI, involving an accident and blood alcohol level that was much higher than the legal level, more than a year ago. It is one of the most unimaginable and unthinkable event of my life. I reached out to Attorney Thomas Fleming, who is the best DUI lawyer around. The moment I talked to him I knew he’s a heaven-sent.

He guided me through the process and gave me incredible recommendations to help me get on with my situation. Took all his time to represent me on both hearings, from the DMV and the court. Flawlessly convinced the DA to dismiss my DUI charge and dropped it to a wet and reckless, with no punishment or penalty whatsoever. He also had the judge find me not guilty of the DUI. The court then ordered the DMV to not suspend my license. He miraculously made the impossible to be possible.

With all that being said, I am beyond thankful, grateful and Blessed to have him by my side all this time. Miracles do happen and he is a miracle worker.

Attorney Thomas Fleming got my case dismissed and all my arrest and court records sealed!

I was charged with a hit and run, with suspicion of dui, due to a car accident with other parties involved and a totaling of my vehicle.  It was a bit of a complicated case and after contacting a few different attorneys I ended up retaining Thomas Fleming.

This came at a time in my life where things were already difficult enough and then came the filing of a court case. Once Thomas Fleming agreed to handle my case, I knew I was in good hands. He relieved most of the stress I had about the case and kept me informed throughout the entire process. He also agreed to appear for me and considering this was in a different county than I reside, transportation was extremely difficult without a vehicle.

He was able to get the DA and Judge to agree to a complete dismissal of my case. Without me even requesting it, he met and talked with DA privately,and got the judge to sign a court order sealing and destroying the record of the arrest and the court case. I can now legally say I was never arrested or charged in court.

Thomas Fleming an excellent attorney he is a genuinely super honest and good person who truly cares about his clients. I hired him as an attorney, but in the end I gained a friend and a life advisor. He goes above and beyond for his clients and on a scale from 1-5 stars he gets a 10!

After I was arrested for a DUI, I found Thomas Fleming and retained him. I was in need of a top-notch DUI lawyer. He delivered in every way. He got my DUI case in court dismissed. We went to trial with DMV, and I was found not guilty.

From the very first consultation, he was incredibly professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely cared about my case. He patiently walked me through every step of the process, explaining my options and what to expect.

Thomas was always responsive and made me feel confident during an incredibly stressful time. If you’re looking for a lawyer who genuinely cares for each of his clients and will fight for the best possible outcome, Thomas is the one you want on your side.

All I can say is amen and thank you God. Last year I found myself in an unfortunate circumstance a drunk driver hit me on cinco de mayo weekend and kept going. I did not flee the scene, however I found myself in jail because I had been drinking. This was one of the most scariest times of my life what happens next how is this going to affect me forever. I began looking around for lawyers and found Thomas. I read his reviews and his website. It seemed like a great fit especially because his faith is so strong that he helped me understand that this can be apart of my testimony and doesn’t have to be the end. Our first court date they offered me a plea of guilty of DUI and Thomas advocated for me to have more time to show and prove that this was a mistake that I am taking seriously. As time went on of fighting this DUI case I realized that it can only work if you are willing to make the necessary changes. There is homework required of you it sounds like a lot but you are looking for that miracle from God so work is required. I found myself in back to back AA meetings, IOP, DUI classes, his RCIA classes and volunteering what mattered to me is that I learn something not only for myself, but how it affects others. We went back to court I was more confident this time on what is in God’s will will be. That time of taking those classes my spirit had been transformed to understanding how to make better choices and better decisions. It happened! I was granted my miracle my case went from being charged with a DUI to the DUI being dismissed and changed to a wet and wreck-less. Thank God. God sends us people in our life who will help us grow and learn. Thomas is the lawyer to make this test you are facing your testimony. I highly recommend.

based off these reviews it seems like he just takes DUI cases. I was waiting hours for a call back that he promised made me explain the entire situation into specific details, The time that he said he was going to call me back past and I texted him asking I didn’t get the call then he stated that he will not be taking my case. I think this is very unprofessional To have someone in a very Vulnerable moment explain in detail what the situation is and then to miss a callback instead of letting me know that he cannot take the case he just had me waiting.
reviews.ownerResponse: This is not a client, and not a client review.  We declined to take this case.  What is described here is not accurate.  God bless you.

reviews.text:
I was charged with 3 different DUI charges, after a terrible accident that overturned my car. My BAC was in the medium range.

A friend recommended Mr. Fleming, who had represented them in a similar case. From our first call, he provided incredible advice and comfort. He is not only experienced and well-connected but also a compassionate mentor. I want to thank him for being such an amazing and effective lawyer during one of the toughest times in my life.

Although the prosecutor offered a chunk of time in county jail, Mr. Fleming managed to reduce my DUI charge to a Wet and Reckless. He also convinced the prosecutor to let me do some volunteer hours at the charity of my choosing.

The Wet and Reckless charge are expungable in one year.

This second chance was only made possible by Mr. Fleming's strong work ethic, recommendations, and guidance. Throughout the process, Mr. Fleming had such faith that he increased my faith. He ensured I was okay, providing constant support and reassurance.

His dedication and genuine concern for my well-being were extraordinary. He worked late nights on my case and was extremely accommodating around my schedule, even when I procrastinated on court documentation. Mr. Fleming made sure I was okay during one of the hardest obstacles in my life.

I will never make this mistake again, and I am forever grateful for his support. He is a blessing, and I highly recommend him to anyone in need of an outstanding lawyer.

"I was so blessed to have hired Thomas Fleming as my attorney to represent my DUI case. I was real worried because of my history.

As my case was quite complex, I was amazed with the miraculous results in my favor!  The court gave me a verdict of not guilty on the DUI charges and gave me a reduced charge of only a Wet Reckless. There was no punishment and only pay a small fee & complete an online course.

Moreover, DMV tried to suspend my license but the Court overruled DMV and ordered DMV not to suspend my license!  Keeping my license was really important because I work for law enforcement.

I’m impressed by Thomas’s professional approach, strategy, and handling of my case.  I don’t know how he did it but I thank god that Thomas made miracles happen for me!

A little over a year and a half ago I was involved in a multi vehicle accident and was facing multiple DUI felony charges, a very dark and low time in my life and felt like I was going to lose everything.

I contacted Thomas. and right away he managed to instill hope in me, at a time when I felt all was lost. I followed his direction as legal counsel and in time my case ended with the best possible outcome with all things considered.

Mr. Fleming was absolutely awesome as my attorney. The felonies and all DUI charges were all dismissed. I couldn’t have asked for a better ally on my side. I hope I will never need his legal counsel again but for anyone looking for help, call Thomas Fleming. His knowledge and experience saved me legally. I believe he was truly God sent.

Outside of being an awesome lawyer Mr. and Ms. Fleming are good people, very genuine and caring and treat you like family. This has been a real dark time in my life, and I am thankful that they have helped me and my family through this chapter. I really appreciate Thomas; he is a great lawyer and awesome human being!

I was arrested for DUI in October last year. My BAC was well over 0.08. I thought my life was over. This was my first DUI and I didn’t know what to do. I am here on a student visa and a lot to lose with a conviction. I could even be kicked out of the country of any criminal conviction. I was lost and full with anxiety.

I hired Thomas Fleming from my recommendation of my friend. Thomas not only cares about getting the best outcome for your case but also cares about your overall well-being. With all the evidence all pointing towards me, I am really worried about my life and the results that is coming for me.

He gave a lot of good recommendations and guide me every steps. I followed every step all the way.

My case had multiple court hearing dates, and multiple DMV hearing dates. With Thomas’ help and the grace of God, we got multiple miracle. First, DMV found me not guilty at the DMV hearing. Second, the judge found me not guilty and dismiss the DUI case in court!

I discovered Thomas is a lawyer that will fight for you until the very end even tho it is really hard. He is a really wonderful and professional lawyer. I am really lucky to have him to represents me. I hope you are as blessed and lucky as me!

Terrible representation I ever had. He spent more time to refute my event instead of defending. I don’t understand why all these reviews are saying their cases got dismissed because mine was circumstantial which is 50% of chance, he wouldn’t even take my testimony after he took my $5000

Mr Thomas, confidentiality has been waived from my side
reviews.ownerResponse: These are lies and distortions.. all for the purpose of extortion.  I truly hope you find peace.

reviews.text:
I actually work as an officer in the law enforcement field and was involved in DUI arrests.

However, I hit rock bottom when I was charged with a DUI. To make things worse, I was involved in a solo crash (hitting the guard rail on the freeway) and my BAC was in the medium range. This was my first time getting in trouble with the law.

I knew I needed to get solid representation. I stumbled upon Thomas through a quick search on Yelp. I noted his extensive experience, training and strong educational background and decided to contact him. Thomas responded immediately. After a quick phone call, I knew I was in good hands.

Thomas is a true legal expert. He exceeded my expectations in every way. Thomas was incredibly knowledgeable, professional and compassionate throughout the entire process. He explained everything clearly, answered all my questions patiently and fought tirelessly to get me the best possible outcome. His conversations helped me increase my own faith in God and helped me elevate myself.

It was a very hard fight. The prosecutor at first refused to have mercy and give me a break. But Thomas was able to talk to the judge and prosecutor privately and somehow got them to end up agreeing to dismiss my DUI charges and give me a Wet Reckless instead. No punishment of jail or work, just pay a small fine, take a 12 hour online class and expunge my record in one year.

This was truly a miracle. I can now continue to work as a law enforcement officer. As an officer, I’d highly suggest Thomas. I’m so grateful for Thomas and without hesitation, I would highly recommend him to anyone in need of legal assistance.

I was arrested for DUI and Possession of a controlled substance. I thought my life was over. This was my first DUI and I didn’t know what to do.

I hired Thomas Fleming because he not only cares about getting the best outcome for your case but also cares about your overall well-being. I was arrested in a county which is strict for DUI and substance. With all the evidence all pointing towards me, I was looking at the maximum sentence of at least a year in prison, 3 years probation, suspended license, and expensive court fees.

By the grace of God and with Thomas’ help, I received no jail, the DUI charge and drug charge were dismissed in exchange for a wet reckless, no volunteer service, and only $220 in court fees.

I just need to take a 12 hour online class and wait a year later for expungement. It was so worth it to obtain Thomas’ services!

I discovered Thomas is a lawyer that will fight for you until the very end but also has become a mentor and a friend.Even after the case is over, he still checks on how I am doing.

If you have a case and you are in my shoes, contacting Thomas is the smartest move you can make!

I was in a very dark place and facing many consequences from the court. For driving a vehicle with a very high blood alcohol level. I didn’t think there was any hope. Then I believe God guided me to Thomas.

Thomas is an amazing lawyer and very skilled at what he does. Thomas worked very hard on my case and was always reaching out to me. He always answered my phone calls and emails immediately.

Thomas helped me so much in a very hard time. Because of Thomas I did not get any jail time, didn’t lose my license, and didn’t get a DUI conviction!

I am very thankful for Thomas Fleming. I am happy to call Thomas a close friend now after all of his help and support. Thomas even helped me outside of court and encouraged and guided me to grow and elevate as a person. I wouldn’t have wanted it any other way!
Simply the best attorney in Northern California if not all of the west coast when it comes to helping with criminal law cases.

In one of the worst episodes of my life, I faced a very serious second-time DUI charge with a high BAC which could easily have resulted in jail time, and to make matters worse, I had to face it from out-of-state as I live in a different state.  I can't describe the fear that I felt as I thought life as I knew it might be over, and an unknowable horror awaited me in the future.

Fortunately, I looked for a lawyer and found Mr. Thomas Fleming, and I do not think that was a coincidence!  Someone up there was looking out for me.  Mr. Fleming calmly helped me lay out of plan of action, which was key not only for the benefit of my case, but for my life, as he and I talked about the fact that it was clear I had a problem that needed attention and action.  Setting about doing everything I could to address that problem was not only good for my case and perhaps even life-saving for my life, but it brought me up out of the depths of fear.  I had something positive to focus my mind on - something positive to do with my time while waiting to find out my fate, instead of spiraling downward with the fear of what was to come!

Not only this, but Mr. Fleming prayed together with me, and that was the best action I took, and the most anxiety-relieving.  I got many chances to speak and pray with Mr. Fleming over the course of the next year, and it felt like he had welcomed me into his family.  It meant so much to me to know that someone who actually cared about me and believed in me was working on my case.

In the end, the outcome of my case was extremely favorable.  It truly did feel like a miracle that I would not be sentenced to jail time.  Instead I was only told do to only do 8 hours of volunteer work at any charity.  What was required of me instead were all things that were good for me and which I would gladly do - not things that would tear me down and upend my life like jail time would have.  I can't express my gratitude to God and to Mr. Fleming enough - but what I can do is pay it forward!  I certainly will be spending the rest of my life happily doing that, and hopefully helping to bring peace and healing to others who are facing similar things.

First I would like to appreciate everything Thomas has done for me and my dui case.

I honestly felt so scared after my accident especially because others were involved . My case was a very tough one due to my BAC and me hitting someone else. Luckily no one was severely injured.

Thanks to Thomas my case was lowered to a wet reckless and they gave me the best deal I could possibly get thanks to such an amazing talented lawyer. Thomas also got the court to actually find me not guilty of the dui , which means under the law that dmv was ordered to also find me not guilty so that I never lost my license.

I struggled finding a lawyer and hesitated but honestly I went with my gut feeling and I prayed to god that I would find someone who could really help me out in probably what was been one of the toughest positions in my life. I cannot express how relieved and happy I am that everything went well thanks to this amazing lawyer.

If your in a situation like me, talk to Thomas and let him bring a blessing to you! God bless you Thomas!

Bad things happen to good people. In my 62 years on this earth, I have NEVER been involved in a criminal matter. A moment in time, after losing my father, and having to take in my mother with dementia I was involved in a traffic altercation in which I lost my composure, which is so unlike me.

Upon receiving a notice to appear in Superior Court for reckless driving I started researching Criminal Lawyers in my County. I came across the Law Offices of Thomas Fleming. He had excellent reviews, so I reached out to him and his firm. After a long phone call with Thomas, I decided to retain him to represent me.

It turned out to be the best decision I could have possibly taken. His understanding of my situation and the Law was beyond comprehension. With his guidance along with his and my faith he guided me through a very difficult and intimidating time.

Not only to have my case completely dismissed, but he also navigated an Order to Seal Arrest and Related Records, simply put, AMAZING!

My family and I are truly blessed & grateful, to have Thomas by my side, helping me navigate through this very difficult time.

If you EVER need an outstanding Lawyer to represent you, do not hesitate to reach out to Thomas, he IS a complete blessing.

I’m very grateful to      Mr. Thomas Fleming for all his hard work, genuine support and guidance throughout my DUI process.

Due to my momentarily lapse of judgement I drove home after having a drink and got arrested for DUI. Luckily I found Attorney Thomas M. Fleming. From the first time meeting him to the end of my process he was genuinely caring, confident and professional. His guidance saved me.

Since it was my first arrest I had no idea what to do, Mr. Fleming explained the process at every step of the way. As a sole provider of my family it was very important that I need to be able to drive to work, Mr. Fleming worked tirelessly to keep my driving privilege.

I had a 0.12 percent Blood alcohol reading. However, attorney Fleming got my charges dismissed in court.

With DMV, dmv at first would not dismiss my case. We had to fight at DMV hearing. In my case, he hired an expert forensic toxicologist who gave an expert opinion that there was “ a  rising blood alcohol” in my case  and that the real blood alcohol reading, at the time of my driving, was below 0.08 percent. DMV then found me not guilty and I got my license back right away.

I could see it is a lot of work until the end and I couldn’t have gotten the amazing results at both court and DMV hearings without Mr. Fleming’s hard work.

If you find yourself in a dreadful situation, don’t hesitate to call the Attorney Thomas M. Fleming. You don’t have to go through it alone. He will be there every step of the way and most importantly he will be a step ahead. He took care of the whole process, therefore I was able to work on myself mentally and spiritually to not be in this situation again.

My family and I truly appreciate Mr. Fleming. We couldn’t have gotten the best results without him. Thank you Mr. Fleming for giving us the best holiday news. Mr. Fleming and I are always considered a family now.

In the early morning of the last week in January 2023, my life took a dark turn when I found myself pulled over and detained for driving under the influence with a staggering .12 blood alcohol concentration (BAC). The day that followed my release was a whirlwind of confusion and fear, with no clear plan in sight to salvage my tarnished record, evade jail time, and cope with the looming fines.

Amidst a daunting array of attorney options, my instincts led me to Thomas, and it turned out to be a pivotal decision. From the moment I first connected with him, Thomas radiated confidence and provided me with the much-needed peace of mind to navigate the complex legal process. He not only met but exceeded my expectations. Throughout the suspenseful nine months that followed, he encouraged me, kept me well-informed, carefully explaining each step along the way.

As the days passed, I found myself summoned for a full court trial, my anxiety mounting with each passing moment. To my sheer astonishment, the case against me was dismissed, and I was declared not guilty. But the ordeal wasn't over; a full DMV trial loomed on the horizon. Thomas, however, continued to be my guiding light. Thomas had the brilliant idea of hiring a forensic toxicologist to shore up the defense. Against all odds, after a full DMV trial, the DMV officer found in my favor and found me not guilty. He not only saved my driver's license from suspension but had me found not guilty again – a feat that carried less than a 1% chance, especially given the fact that I had registered a BAC over .12 four times during my traffic stop.

With Thomas at my side, I achieved a double victory – escaping conviction, avoiding the dreaded ignition lock, sidestepping driver's license suspension, and steering clear of jail time.

I will forever be grateful to God for the day I chose Thomas, a decision that I made the moment I stumbled upon his profile on Yelp.

I want to thank Thomas for his efforts & faith. With my dui case of having over .10% BAC (well above the legal limit), Thomas was able to talk to the DA & got the DA to dismiss my criminal DUI case.

For the DMV case, we actually went to trial with DMV at a DMV hearing. Thomas hired an Forensic toxicologist expert to testify that the BAC must have been lower than the legal limit. With a BAC that high, the odds were against me. However, after the trial, the DMV hearing officer found me NOT guilty ! I received two miracles in a row.

Thomas provided me with resources to help me get through such troubling times. Thomas WILL work hard, a lot of the work is done behind the scenes but no need to worry with the expertise & resources Thomas has, you can feel the weight off your shoulder already. Winning a case like mine is very rare but Thomas didn’t back down from the challenge.

I have realized that God can still grant miracles. Thomas restored my faith to believe once again.

Thank you Mr. Fleming for helping me through this process, & winning both the court & DMV cases. Now I can continue my life & will never again Drive under the influence.

Mr.Thomas Thank you so much for all your help! For believing that my wife and I are good people. Thomas helped with my wife's case. He was able to make sure she kept her license and got her case dismissed! I thank God for having you to help us with this and for being a caring person towards us. I cant thank you enough for everything you've done for us.

I had a DUI with an accident and my car got totaled. I found that Thomas is the best lawyer to ever acquire. He managed to change my DUI to a wet reckless. He managed to convince the jury and the judge to Helmandollar Plea! (This is very rare!) I have no jail time, no work detail, and no volunteer hours, Thomas also persuaded the judge to waive all the court fines and fees. This alone saved me thousands of dollars. I just have to complete a 12 hour class. Therefore, I recommend Thomas Fleming to anyone in need of legal representation for a DUI case. He is the man with a plan!

I cannot express enough gratitude to Thomas Fleming for his exceptional legal expertise and unwavering dedication in handling my DUI case. Facing charges of driving with a blood alcohol level of .16 and exceeding the speed limit by more than double, I was genuinely terrified of the potential consequences. However, thanks to Mr. Fleming's expertise, my case was significantly lessened to a "wet and reckless" charge, sparing me from severe penalties.

From the moment I reached out to Thomas Fleming's law firm, I was
met with professionalism and compassion. He carefully listened to my situation,
offered reassurance, and outlined a strategic plan for my defense. Thomas's
deep understanding of DUI laws and his extensive courtroom experience proved to

Thomas's persuasive arguments, coupled with his unwavering

reckless" charge, a significantly lighter offense. The impact of this

livelihood, and future prospects.

Moreover, Thomas Fleming's personalized approach was truly
remarkable. He made sure to keep me well-informed at every stage of the legal
process, patiently addressing my concerns and answering my numerous questions.
His professionalism, accessibility, and genuine care for my well-being provided
a level of support that was comforting during an otherwise stressful period. I can happily say that I consider Thomas and his wife Reyline as part of my family.

I wholeheartedly recommend Thomas Fleming to anyone in need of
top-notch legal representation for a DUI case. His expertise, tenacity, and
compassionate approach makes him an exceptional attorney. Thomas Fleming is the
embodiment of professionalism, and his commitment to securing the best possible
outcome for his clients is unparalleled. If you're seeking an attorney who will
fight tirelessly for your rights and deliver results, look no further than
Thomas Fleming.

I did not feel like I was just another client, and over time that became more and more evident that Thomas' was of business is very sincere. More than just a lawyer to represent me, Thomas was concerned with my well being and acted as a rock in my corner I knew I could be honest with and count on. Thomas represented me with an elite level of not only professionalism, but guidance personally and spiritually, negotiation skills in the court room, and most importantly, a sincere and genuine support system as a human being. Thomas eased my worries and we are still very close to this day and I know I will know him forever as a mentor and part of my family!

The specifics is Thomas negotiated waiving my DUI ticket fee and informal probation.

If you need representation, you have found the correct Lawyer who specializes in this field with ample experience.

Thank You Thomas! Ill forever be grateful for your representation and the quality person you are. A true blessing to have met you !

I found Thomas Fleming to represent me. He discussed the case with the district attorney, and got them to dismiss my case. The DMV then took action against me. Thomas again talked to a DMV officer, and persuaded them to dismiss the DMV action also!

He is an excellent attorney and helped me personally in my time of urgent need. He is very passionate, caring, and great at his job. He goes above and beyond and does more than most attorneys would. Highly recommended.

Mr. Fleming is the best attorney, including DUI, and court matters, and DMV, in the entire San Francisco Bay Area, East Bay, and Northern California. He is very professional and super helpful.We had a great experience and we're very happy with his office team. I highly recommend him.

I recently got two DUI cases in a row.  Very bad. A friend of mine at work had celebrated a dismissal of her DUI case from a year previous (2020). So l asked her who her lawyer was and said it was Attorney Thomas Fleming, who won the dismissal because of an unlawful police action. I called Mr. Fleming and was fortunate that he accepted my cases.

First and foremost Mr. Fleming supported in every way. Secondly, he represented me with extreme expertise. Because of my two cases, he immediately suggested l start getting alcohol treatment.  I completed this in 3 months. Furthermore, he strongly recommended AA meetings, several per week if possible, w/ proof of attendance. This proved to be fortuitous advice, as the court later ordered me doing 2 AA meetings per week WITH PROOF of attendance.

As my case went along, Mr. Fleming continued giving me strong advice, showing up in my stead in court, and constantly supporting my sobriety. Furthermore, he got the DMV to issue me a substitute drivers license (paper allowing me to drive while the court considered my case - my CDL had been taken, obviously, by the police). This was HUGE, as l was able to continue to work.

After one year’s time, just a week or so before 365 days of the date of my offenses, Mr. Fleming appeared w/ me in court before the judge. Judgement day had arrived. (I hadn’t had to appear in court up to this time, AND in fact, had led pretty much my normal life, thanks to Mr. Fleming’s representation. Although, NOW l was sober, thank God.) Mr. Fleming negotiated intensively and passionately with the DA - l don’t know what was said, but it was very favorable for me. The judge and Mr. Fleming seemed to have a good rapport… the bottom line? No jail time or any volunteer work. Minimal court fees. No alcohol-blow-thing put in my car, l just have to attend a DUI class, which l will gladly do. And the DUI charge was dropped to a wet-reckless.  Amazing.

It’s basically a miracle, the outcome of my cases.  One thing l would like to emphasize is this: Mr. Fleming recommended a number of things that turned out to be critical for my case and for his negotiation with the DA and court. Honestly, l feel as though l’ve been given a new lease on life and will be forever grateful to Mr. Fleming (AND my co-worker friend for her recommendation). I also feel strongly that due to his constant and fastidious efforts representing and fighting for me, I felt I could not relapse since I do not want to let down my family, the court and Mr. Fleming, who cared very much for me.

I think Mr. Fleming is the best attorney that there is.  He did an outstanding job as my attorney, and I would recommend him over anyone else.  Thank you again for saving me, Mr. Fleming!
Very knowledgeable and experienced.

I rarely write, but I felt I need to write a review. Because Attorney, Fleming goes far above and beyond.

At the time I desperately needed an attorney, I contacted him and he reached out me prompt.

He helped me through the hardest time in my life. With his expertise and deep knowledge of criminal justices system, he helped my criminal charge to be dismissed.

Even more, he has never forgotten his compassion to his clients.
If it was not Mr. Fleming, my situation would be ended totally different outcome.

I appreciate his professionalism and compassion and kindness throughout whole process.  I can’t be happier than I am today.

Thank you, Mr, Fleming. I definitely recommend him for those in need.
