I can't mention enough how thorough and assertive, Mr. Fleming was in helping resolve my case. He went far above and beyond all expectations and was able to reduce my charges significantly, from DUI to Wet and Reckless and even helped get an Acquittal on my other charge. I couldn't be happier with his performance and how he went out of his way to help to come to the best resolution possible. If anyone needs legal advice, I wouldn't hesitate and, he would be the first person I'd call.  Mr. Fleming is a pleasure to work with and is very much appreciated for his spiritual guidance and walk throughout my whole ordeal.

I cannot say enough about how thankful I am for Thomas and the services he has provided me. When my arrest occurred, I was in a place of fear, anger and anxiety. I had turned away from my faith and had been allowing worldly desires and aspirations to influence, guide and control me. It was by the grace of God that I found Thomas and was brought to seek out his guidance and services. After being arrested for a second DUI in three years and in a state of despair and frustration, I called Thomas to request his services. Thomas acted with the utmost professionalism, compassion and respect in dealing with my case. He answered all of my questions and concerns with honesty and in a timely manner. All of his recommendations, guidance and advice were helpful and greatly beneficial in resolving my case.

Initially, the DA sought to not reduce my charge, and I was looking at jail time, community service, thousands of dollars in fines, and lengthy year long classes. Any chance of a reduction or different outcome was a huge uphill battle. Throughout my case, Thomas insisted on working to get the best possible outcome for me. Nearly every morning I would wake up and think about my case, thoughts of fear and anxiety clouding my ability to think clearly. Thomas insisted I not let fear and anxiety control me, but rather give all of myself to God. The conversations with Thomas were reassuring and although I did not always have the closure I sought, my faith strengthened through this suffering and uncertainty.

My case required multiple court appearances. In handling legal proceedings, Thomas's experience and preparedness were glaringly evident. Thomas was able to get my charge reduced to a wet reckless. I was able to avoid both jail time and community service, as well as save hundreds of dollars in court fees. A miracle in itself! Also, I faced a year long hard license suspension as a result of the charge, yet Thomas was able to get my license retroactively suspended! Thus, I was able to keep my license from being suspended after the case was resolved. Miracles I would have never thought possible occured, in part because I trusted Thomas's experience, but also because I understood the outcome would be God’s will for me.

At this point in my life my faith has never been stronger and had I not met Thomas, I question where I would be in my spiritual journey and in life. Throughout this entire process and these experiences, I felt confident and assured knowing I had Thomas in my corner. I would be cutting Thomas short to simply refer to him as an excellent lawyer. He is an incredibly thoughtful and compassionate person who only wants the best for those he works and comes in contact with. I am forever grateful for all that he has done for me.

What can I say about Thomas Fleming other than he is an amazing lawyer. I had a lapse in judgement and was arrested for domestic violence incident. In the beginning I was lost. I hardly get in trouble so getting arrested and what follows after is something I’m not familiar with. After days of the incident and reading forums and watching YouTube vids of what could potentially happened to me I was having real bad anxiety attacks. So I went to look up a lawyer who would take my case. I emailed a couple lawyers but Thomas was the first who responded quickly. After explaining to Thomas my situation he gave me a peace of mind and knew I needed not look no further. Thomas gave me a list of things to do before my first court date. That’s when good things started happening and when we went to court a slight miracle happened. Long story short after a year and 1 month later we arrived at my 4th court appearance because it kept getting pushed which wasn’t a bad thing because at the end I received way less than I should’ve got. Thomas tirelessly worked on my case for over a year and was always there to answer any questions or just check up on me. Thomas really cares about his clients and about his work and it shows. Thomas amazed me in court many time with the knowledge he would speak in the court room towards the DA and the judge. Because of Thomas I have a second chance at life and I don’t intend to ruin that chance. At first the court and DA demanded 60 days of jail time for my case. After intense negotiations Thomas convince the court and DA of no jail time and no work details. Thomas pulled of a miracle!!!! As Thomas says, all glory goes to God! Not only did I have the best lawyer I could ask for, I believe I made a friend and a mentor I look up too. So if you’re going through hard times, remember what you’re going through doesn’t define who you are, it’s what you do after. Forgive yourself, pick yourself back up, and help others who are in need.

A Yelp review lacks the sufficient space to write how much Thomas Fleming means to me. I was facing a second DUI during a challenging period of my life where I lacked integrity and spirituality to lead a better life. I contacted Thomas Fleming after spending hours reading multiple reviews and within minutes of speaking, I knew I found my attorney. His impressive Yale law education, his over twenty years of experience as a DUI attorney, and his concern in my spiritual growth is why I was fortunate enough to retain Thomas Fleming as my attorney.

Thomas Fleming is a brilliant attorney. He was able to have my second DUI charge reduced to a Wet and Reckless and enter a Helmandollar plea of not guilty. The outcome for my case is rare for a first DUI. It is a miracle for a second DUI. My driving record is saved, I kept my driver's license, and my career is safe. Only an attorney like Thomas Fleming with strong analytical skills, his knowledge of the law, perseverance, negotiation talent, people skills, creativity and compassion can deliver such a lifesaving outcome.

Thomas Fleming is more than my attorney- he is my friend and mentor. He continues to help me after my case to navigate the complex bureaucratic process. He mentors me to lead a better life by placing priority in my spirituality. I am fortunate to have found Thomas Fleming. I hope you are too.

Thomas helped me get my DUI reduced to a Wet Reckless with the court, and Got my Case Dismissed completed with the DMV, he is a life saver he saved me thousands of dollars on my insurance and DUI fees. Thomas is a godly man and goes above and beyond in his cases, he is a very compassionate lawyer if you want the best outcome pick, Thomas Fleming! Glad I met him.

They say Miracles happen Every Day I wasn't a believer until I let Thomos. Last April I was charged with my first offense of a DUI, I couldn't believe it I have been never in Trouble before and I was scared to death. So after being released from the detention center overnight I knew I never wanted to be there again, So as soon as I got home I started to search for attorneys, I didn't know where to start since I've never done this before so my husband was helping me, He said "why don't you give this guy a call I have a good feeling about him" I said "ok".

I knew as soon as we started talking and he told me everything is going to be okay and he was a firm believer of God I know I found my lawyer. As the months past by  and we were preparing for my court date I was very scared and didn't know  what to expect, Thomos was there for me the whole time.

My court date came and all I can do is pray and hope  everything is going to be ok and so we prayed together and when it came to the moment, I was not punished in the way I was expecting. I got very lucky and blessed to have been received the consequences I did. Which included

Thank you Thomos you Truly are a blessing and helped me become a stronger and better person then I was before.

The final result speaks for itself. The decision was fair and clearly reflected the serious and well-structured work they put into the case.

reviews.text:
Over the past year, my husband and I have been navigating a complex and emotionally challenging Family Law case involving his son. As the opposing party in the matter, we were introduced to Flavio Carvalho Law. Understandably, the beginning of this journey was difficult—no one enters a Family Law case without a degree of apprehension and emotional strain.

Early in the process, we were connected with Mark Hylland, a paralegal at Flavio Carvalho Law. From our very first interaction, Mark stood out for his professionalism, genuine enthusiasm, and commitment to fostering a respectful and solution-oriented environment. His ability to balance empathy with assertiveness has been instrumental in moving the case forward constructively.

Throughout this process, Mark has consistently demonstrated a remarkable ability to create space for all voices to be heard—including those of the opposing party. His approach has emphasized collaboration, mutual respect, and, most importantly, the best interests of the child at the center of the case. Mark has served as a steady and reassuring presence, offering clarity and hope during a time that often felt uncertain.

His efforts have not only helped facilitate meaningful dialogue between all parties but have also laid the groundwork for potential resolution and alignment. Mark has truly been an invaluable asset—his professionalism, communication skills, and dedication to fairness have made a significant difference in our experience.

We are deeply grateful for the role Mark has played and remain hopeful that, with his continued support, all parties can reach a resolution that prioritizes the well-being of the child and fosters long-term cooperation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience. We're thrilled to hear that Mark Hylland has made such a positive impact on your Family Law case. reviews.text: Very good attorney
Terrible attorney. Keep saying someone was going to call me for weeks and never did.  Then have the never to tell me "look is been the holidays" I guess I'll tell the judge that same thing.

Although this firm never represented my wife and I regarding our auto accident, I am writing a quick note about them. Last year, when I called to speak with an attorney, I was quickly connected to Eliot Houman. I immediately let him know that I thought his firm might not be able to help me but asked if he would take a few minutes. He said he would be glad to listen and patiently did so. More than half an hour later, he explained why my case was not for his firm, but he gave me astute advice. Clearly, I was impressed with the time he had taken at no charge and with his kind, considerate approach. Subsequently, he took more time, again at no charge, to respond to a number of emails I sent. Each time, he answered quickly and helpfully. At the time of our conversation, I did not realize that Eliot is one of the firm’s co-founders. As I subsequently wrote to Eliot, “You knew from the first few moments we spoke on the phone that I was not a potential client. Most people in business, including attorneys, would have cut the conversation short for that reason. You, on the other hand, chose to be kind and helpful. And then I came back with more questions and you continued to help. My conclusion is that you have learned something very important about life that few understand – doing the right thing is more important than making money. You should be proud of yourself for being so evolved.” I share this now in the hopes it might help give perspective on the spirit of the firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:

While we weren’t able to represent you and your wife regarding your auto accident, we’re really glad you felt heard and supported during your conversations with Attorney Eliot. Knowing that this came through so clearly in your experience is incredibly meaningful. Thank you again for sharing your perspective and for your generous words. We wish you and your wife all the very best.

reviews.text:
**5-Star Review for The Accident Guys**

After my daughter and I were rear-ended by a driver who happened to have the same insurance company as us, we were overwhelmed and unsure of what to do next. From the very first phone call, The Accident Guys stepped in with empathy, professionalism, and unwavering support. Their first question wasn’t about paperwork—it was about how my daughter and I were doing. That level of compassion set the tone for the entire experience.

From there, everything was handled seamlessly. They connected us with the right doctors, communicated directly with our insurance company, and made sure we had the support we needed every step of the way. The Accident Guys run a well-oiled machine, combining competence with genuine care.

We were assigned a personal case manager, Miriam, who was outstanding—always available to answer questions and relentless in advocating for a fair settlement, especially when our own insurer was reluctant to even cover a rental car.

Would I recommend The Accident Guys? Absolutely. I will not gatekeep this experience—everyone deserves this level of service and advocacy after an accident.

Monica J
reviews.ownerResponse: Monica, thank you so much for this incredibly thoughtful and heartfelt review. We're truly grateful you took the time to share your experience, and we’re even more grateful that we could be there for you and your daughter during such a difficult time. It’s wonderful to hear that Miriam provided the kind of support and advocacy you needed, she’s a rockstar and we’ll definitely make sure she sees your kind words! We appreciate your recommendation. Wishing you and your daughter all the best moving forward, and know that we’re always here if you ever need us again.

Everyone on the team, from Christopher, Edward, Christina, and Sara (literally EVERY person I worked with; I'm so sorry if I forgot a name), has been kind, friendly, and dedicated to helping me through this process. I was always treated with respect, and they were always responsive to my questions.

I cannot thank them enough--easy 5/5 stars. I recommend going to them if you have the unfortunate opportunity to be in my position back then. I would love to work with them again, but I would rather not be in another car accident!
